Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * The category of complexes over an additive category *)
(** ** Contents
- Definition of complexes [def_complexes]
  - Complexes and morphisms between complexes
  - Direct sum of complexes
  - Construction of some complexes from objects
- The precategory of complexes over an additive precategory [complexes_precategory]
- The precategory of complexes over an additive precategory is an additive category,
  [complexes_additive]
- Precategory of complexes over an abelian category is abelian [complexes_abelian]
- Useful transports for complexes
*)

Require Export UniMath.Tactics.EnsureStructuredProofs.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.UnivalenceAxiom.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.BinaryOperations.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Additive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Abelian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AbelianToAdditive.


Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

Local Open Scope hz_scope.
Opaque hz isdecrelhzeq hzplus hzminus hzone hzzero iscommringops ZeroArrow.

(** * Definition of complexes *)
(** ** Introduction
   A complex consists of an objects C_i, for every integer i, and a morphism C_i --> C_{i+1} for
   every i, such that composition of two such morphisms is the zero morphism. One visualizes
   complexes as
                            ... --> C_{i-1} --> C_i --> C_{i+1} --> ...
   A morphism of complexes from a complex C to a complex D is a collection of morphisms C_i --> D_i
   for every integer i, such that for every i the following diagram is commutative
                                 C_i --> C_{i+1}
                                  |        |
                                 D_i --> D_{i+1}

   Composition of morphisms is defined as pointwise composition. It is easy to check that this forms
   a morphisms of complexes. Identity morphism is indexwise identity.

   A direct sum of complexes is given by taking pointwise direct sum of the underlying objects.
   The morphisms between the objects in direct sum complex is given by the following formula
                 Pr1 · (C_i --> C_{i+1]) · In1 + Pr2 · (D_i --> D_{i+1}) · In2
   To show that this defines a direct sum in the category of complexes is straightforward. The zero
   complex is given by zero objects and zero morphisms.
*)
Section def_complexes.

  (** ** Basics of complexes *)

  Variable A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure.

  (** Complex *)
  Definition Complex : UU :=
    ∑ D' : (∑ D : (∏ i : hz, ob A), (∏ i : hz, A⟦D i, D (i + 1)⟧)),
           ∏ i : hz, (pr2 D' i) · (pr2 D' (i + 1)) = ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) _ _.

  Definition make_Complex (D : ∏ i : hz, ob A) (D' : ∏ i : hz, A⟦D i, D (i + 1)⟧)
             (D'' : ∏ i : hz, (D' i) · (D' (i + 1)) = ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) _ _) :
    Complex := ((D,,D'),,D'').

  (** Accessor functions *)
  Definition Complex_Funclass (C : Complex) : hz -> ob A := pr1 (pr1 C).
  Coercion Complex_Funclass : Complex >-> Funclass.

  Definition Diff (C : Complex) (i : hz) : A⟦C i, C (i + 1)⟧ := pr2 (pr1 C) i.

  Definition DSq (C : Complex) (i : hz) :
    (Diff C i) · (Diff C (i + 1)) = ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) _ _ := pr2 C i.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
transportf
  (λ x : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ x i, x (i + 1) ⟧)
  (funextfun C1 C2 (λ i : hz, H i)) (Diff C1) =
Diff C2

H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
transportf
  (λ x : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ x i, x (i + 1) ⟧)
  (funextfun C1 C2 (λ i : hz, H i)) (Diff C1) =
Diff C2

Diff C2

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)

i: hz
transportf
  (λ x : hz → A, ∏ i0 : hz, A ⟦ x i0, x (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  (idpath C1) (Diff C1) i =
transportf (λ x : hz → A, A ⟦ x i, x (i + 1) ⟧)
  (idpath C1) (Diff C1 i)

      apply idpath.

transportf (λ x : hz → A, A ⟦ C2 i, x (i + 1) ⟧)
  (funextfun C1 C2 (λ x : hz, H x))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
i: hz
transportf (λ x0 : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x0 ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x0 : A, A ⟦ x0, C1 (i + 1) ⟧) (H i)
     (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i

    exact (H1 i).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
transportf
  (λ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
   ∏ i : hz,
   pr2 x i · pr2 x (i + 1) =
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (pr1 x i)
     (pr1 x (i + 1 + 1)))
  (total2_paths_f (funextfun C1 C2 (λ i : hz, H i))
     (ComplexEq' C1 C2 H H1)) (DSq C1) = DSq C2

   ∏ i : hz,
   pr2 x i · pr2 x (i + 1) =

  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
isaprop
  (∏ i : hz,
   (pr21 C2) i · (pr21 C2) (i + 1) =
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) ((pr11 C2) i)
     ((pr11 C2) (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
∏ t : hz,
isaprop
  ((pr21 C2) t · (pr21 C2) (t + 1) =
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) ((pr11 C2) t)
     ((pr11 C2) (t + 1 + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
t: hz
isaprop
  ((pr21 C2) t · (pr21 C2) (t + 1) =
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) ((pr11 C2) t)
     ((pr11 C2) (t + 1 + 1)))
 apply to_has_homsets.
  Qed.

C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i

transportf
  (λ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
   ∏ i : hz,
   pr2 x i · pr2 x (i + 1) =
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (pr1 x i)
     (pr1 x (i + 1 + 1))) ?p (pr2 C1) = pr2 C2

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)

i: hz
(pr11 C1) i = (pr11 C2) i
 exact (H i).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
transportf
  (λ x : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ x i, x (i + 1) ⟧)
  (funextfun (pr11 C1) (pr11 C2)
     ((λ i : hz, H i) : pr11 C1 ~ pr11 C2)) (pr21 C1) =
pr21 C2
 exact (ComplexEq' C1 C2 H H1).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: ∏ i : hz, C1 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1 i)) = Diff C2 i
transportf
  (λ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
   ∏ i : hz,
   pr2 x i · pr2 x (i + 1) =
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (pr1 x i)
     (pr1 x (i + 1 + 1)))
  (total2_paths_f
     (funextfun (pr11 C1) (pr11 C2)
        ((λ i : hz, H i) : pr11 C1 ~ pr11 C2))
     (ComplexEq' C1 C2 H H1)) (pr2 C1) = pr2 C2
 exact (ComplexEq'' C1 C2 H H1).
  Defined.

  (** Zero Complex *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
Complex

Complex

hz → A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ ?D i, ?D (i + 1) ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
hz → A
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
i: hz
A
 exact (Additive.to_Zero A).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ i : hz,
A ⟦ (λ _ : hz, Additive.to_Zero A) i,
(λ _ : hz, Additive.to_Zero A) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
i: hz
A ⟦ (λ _ : hz, Additive.to_Zero A) i,
(λ _ : hz, Additive.to_Zero A) (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) _ _).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ i : hz,
(λ _ : hz,
 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
   (Additive.to_Zero A)) i
· (λ _ : hz,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
     (Additive.to_Zero A)) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ _ : hz, Additive.to_Zero A) i)
  ((λ _ : hz, Additive.to_Zero A) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
i: hz
(λ _ : hz,
 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
   (Additive.to_Zero A)) i
· (λ _ : hz,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
     (Additive.to_Zero A)) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ _ : hz, Additive.to_Zero A) i)
  ((λ _ : hz, Additive.to_Zero A) (i + 1 + 1))
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Defined.

  (** Direct sum of two complexes *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
let B1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i) in
let B2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
  in
let B3 :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
  in
BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) B1 B2
· BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 (i + 1))
    (Diff C2 (i + 1)) B2 B3 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
let B1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i) in
let B2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
  in
let B3 :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
  in
BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) B1 B2
· BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 (i + 1))
    (Diff C2 (i + 1)) B2 B3 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) B1 B2
· BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 (i + 1))
    (Diff C2 (i + 1)) B2 B3 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (Diff C2 i · Diff C2 (i + 1)) B1 B3 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ToBinDirectSum B3
  (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · Diff C1 (i + 1)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · Diff C2 (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ToBinDirectSum B3
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i)
       (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · Diff C2 (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ToBinDirectSum B3
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · Diff C2 (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ToBinDirectSum B3
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
  (π₂%abgrcat
   · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i)
       (C2 (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ToBinDirectSum B3
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C2 (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3 =
ToBinDirectSum B3
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C2 (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3 · π₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)

B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3 · π₂%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C2 (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3 · π₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
B3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 B3 · π₂%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) B1 (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

(λ i : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i)) (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) _ _).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i0) (Diff C2 i0)
   (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0) (C2 i0))
   (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 (i0 + 1)))) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i0) (Diff C2 i0)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0) (C2 i0))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 (i0 + 1))))
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0) (C2 i0)) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0) (C2 i0))
     (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i)
   (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))
   (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))) i
· (λ i : hz,
   BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))))
    (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ i : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i)) i)
  ((λ i : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))
     (i + 1 + 1))
 exact (DirectSumComplex_comm i).
  Defined.

  (** Morphism of complexes *)
  Definition Morphism (C1 C2 : Complex) : UU :=
    ∑ D : (∏ i : hz, A⟦C1 i, C2 i⟧), ∏ i : hz, (D i) · (Diff C2 i) = (Diff C1 i) · (D (i + 1)).

  Definition make_Morphism (C1 C2 : Complex) (Mors : ∏ i : hz, A⟦C1 i, C2 i⟧)
             (Comm : ∏ i : hz, (Mors i) · (Diff C2 i) = (Diff C1 i) · (Mors (i + 1))) :
    Morphism C1 C2 := tpair _ Mors Comm.

  (** Accessor functions *)
  Definition MMor {C1 C2 : Complex} (M : Morphism C1 C2) (i : hz) : A⟦C1 i, C2 i⟧ := pr1 M i.
  Coercion MMor : Morphism >-> Funclass.

  Definition MComm {C1 C2 : Complex} (M : Morphism C1 C2) (i : hz) :
    (M i) · (Diff C2 i) = (Diff C1 i) · (M (i + 1)) := pr2 M i.

  (** A lemma to show that two morphisms are the same *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
M1 = M2

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
M1 = M2

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
pr1 M1 = pr1 M2
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧,
   ∏ i : hz, x i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · x (i + 1))
  ?p (pr2 M1) = pr2 M2

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
pr1 M1 = pr1 M2
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
pr1 M1 ~ pr1 M2
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
i: hz
pr1 M1 i = pr1 M2 i
 exact (H i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧,
   ∏ i : hz, x i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · x (i + 1))
  (funextsec (λ t : hz, A ⟦ C1 t, C2 t ⟧) (pr1 M1)
     (pr1 M2) ((λ i : hz, H i) : pr1 M1 ~ pr1 M2))
  (pr2 M1) = pr2 M2
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
isaprop
  (∏ i : hz,
   pr1 M2 i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · pr1 M2 (i + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
∏ t : hz,
isaprop
  (pr1 M2 t · Diff C2 t = Diff C1 t · pr1 M2 (t + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i
t: hz
isaprop
  (pr1 M2 t · Diff C2 t = Diff C1 t · pr1 M2 (t + 1))
 apply to_has_homsets.
  Qed.

  (** Inverse to [MorphismEq] *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2

∏ i : hz, M1 i = M2 i

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
M1 i = M1 i

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** The collection of morphism between two complexes is a set *)

C1, C2: Complex
isaset (Morphism C1 C2)

isaset (Morphism C1 C2)

isaset

 apply to_has_homsets.
  Qed.

  Definition Morphisms_hSet (C1 C2 : Complex) : hSet := make_hSet _ (Morphisms_isaset C1 C2).

  (** Identity Morphism *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1: Complex
i: hz
identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i =
Diff C1 i · identity (C1 (i + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1: Complex
i: hz
identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i =
Diff C1 i · identity (C1 (i + 1))

C1: Complex
i: hz
Diff C1 i = Diff C1 i · identity (C1 (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1: Complex
i: hz
Diff C1 i = Diff C1 i

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1: Complex
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, identity (C1 i0)) i · Diff C1 i =
Diff C1 i · (λ i0 : hz, identity (C1 i0)) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1: Complex
i: hz
(λ i : hz, identity (C1 i)) i · Diff C1 i =
Diff C1 i · (λ i : hz, identity (C1 i)) (i + 1)
 exact (IdMorComm C1 i).
  Defined.

  (** Morphisms from and to Zero complex *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C i) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C i) · Diff C i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i + 1))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
Morphism ZeroComplex C

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
Morphism ZeroComplex C

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ ZeroComplex i, C i ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff C i =
Diff ZeroComplex i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ ZeroComplex i, C i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
A ⟦ ZeroComplex i, C i ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) _ _).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (ZeroComplex i0)
   (C i0)) i · Diff C i =
Diff ZeroComplex i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (ZeroComplex i0)
     (C i0)) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (ZeroComplex i) (C i))
  i · Diff C i =
Diff ZeroComplex i
· (λ i : hz,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (ZeroComplex i)
     (C i)) (i + 1)
 exact (MorphismFromZero_comm C i).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
Diff C i
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i + 1))
    (Additive.to_Zero A)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
Diff C i
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i + 1))
    (Additive.to_Zero A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i)
  (Additive.to_Zero A) =
Diff C i
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i + 1))
    (Additive.to_Zero A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i)
  (Additive.to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

C: Complex
Morphism C ZeroComplex

C: Complex
Morphism C ZeroComplex

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex

Diff C i · ?Mors (i + 1)

i: hz
A ⟦ C i, ZeroComplex i ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) _ _).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
   (ZeroComplex i0)) i · Diff ZeroComplex i =
Diff C i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
     (ZeroComplex i0)) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i) (ZeroComplex i))
  i · Diff ZeroComplex i =
Diff C i
· (λ i : hz,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i)
     (ZeroComplex i)) (i + 1)
 exact (MorphismToZero_comm C i).
  Defined.

  (** Composition of morphisms *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
M1 i · M2 i · Diff C3 i =
Diff C1 i · (M1 (i + 1) · M2 (i + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
M1 i · M2 i · Diff C3 i =
Diff C1 i · (M1 (i + 1) · M2 (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
M1 i · M2 i · Diff C3 i =
Diff C1 i · M1 (i + 1) · M2 (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
M1 i · M2 i · Diff C3 i =
M1 i · Diff C2 i · M2 (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
M1 i · (M2 i · Diff C3 i) =
M1 i · Diff C2 i · M2 (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
M1 i · (M2 i · Diff C3 i) =
M1 i · (Diff C2 i · M2 (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
M2 i · Diff C3 i = Diff C2 i · M2 (i + 1)

    exact (MComm M2 i).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
Morphism C1 C3

M2: Morphism C2 C3

C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C3 i ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff C3 i = Diff C1 i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C3 i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
A ⟦ C1 i, C3 i ⟧
 exact ((M1 i) · (M2 i)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, M1 i0 · M2 i0) i · Diff C3 i =
Diff C1 i · (λ i0 : hz, M1 i0 · M2 i0) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: Complex
M1: Morphism C1 C2
M2: Morphism C2 C3
i: hz
(λ i : hz, M1 i · M2 i) i · Diff C3 i =
Diff C1 i · (λ i : hz, M1 i · M2 i) (i + 1)
 exact (MorphismCompComm M1 M2 i).
  Defined.

  (** ZeroMorphism as the composite of to zero and from zero *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)
· Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 (i + 1))
    (C2 (i + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)
· Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 (i + 1))
    (C2 (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) =
Diff C1 i
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 (i + 1))
    (C2 (i + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
Morphism C1 C2

C1, C2: Complex
Morphism C1 C2

C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) _ _).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0) (C2 i0)) i
· Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0) (C2 i0))
    (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)) i
· Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i
· (λ i : hz,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i))
    (i + 1)
 exact (ZeroMorphism_comm C1 C2 i).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
ZeroMorphism C1 C2 =
MorphismComp (MorphismToZero C1) (MorphismFromZero C2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
ZeroMorphism C1 C2 =
MorphismComp (MorphismToZero C1) (MorphismFromZero C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i =
MorphismComp (MorphismToZero C1) (MorphismFromZero C2)
  i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i =
MorphismComp (MorphismToZero C1) (MorphismFromZero C2)
  i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
MorphismComp (MorphismToZero C1) (MorphismFromZero C2)
  i = ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Qed.

  (** ** Direct sums *)

  (** Inclusions and projections from the DirectSumComplex *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
let B1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i) in
let B2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
  in
ι₁%abgrcat
· BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) B1 B2 =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
let B1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i) in
let B2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
  in
ι₁%abgrcat
· BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) B1 B2 =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
ι₁%abgrcat
· BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) B1 B2 =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat

C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
ι₁%abgrcat
· BinDirectSumIndArFormula A (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i)
    B1 B2 = Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
ι₁%abgrcat
· to_binop B1 B2 (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
    (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat

to_binop (C1 i) B2
  (ι₁%abgrcat · (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (ι₁%abgrcat · (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat

to_binop (C1 i) B2

to_binop (C1 i) B2
  (identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (to_unel (C1 i) (C2 i) · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) =

  (to_unel (C1 i) (C2 i) · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) =

i: hz

B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
to_binop (C1 i) B2 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (to_unel (C1 i) B2) = Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat = Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

C1, C2: Complex
Morphism C1 (DirectSumComplex C1 C2)

 exact (to_In1 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))).

· Diff (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i =

 exact (DirectSumComplexIn1_comm C1 C2 i).

C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
ι₂%abgrcat
· BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) B1 B2 =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
ι₂%abgrcat
· BinDirectSumIndArFormula A (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i)
    B1 B2 = Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop B1 B2 (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
    (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat

  (ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)

i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
to_binop (C2 i) B2
  (ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (identity (C2 i) · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
to_binop (C2 i) B2
  (to_unel (C2 i) (C1 i) · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (identity (C2 i) · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
to_binop (C2 i) B2
  (to_unel (C2 i) (C1 i) · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) = Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
to_binop (C2 i) B2
  (to_unel (C2 i) (C1 (i + 1)) · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) = Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
to_binop (C2 i) B2 (to_unel (C2 i) B2)
  (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) = Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat = Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

Morphism C2 (DirectSumComplex C1 C2)

Morphism C2 (DirectSumComplex C1 C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C2 i, DirectSumComplex C1 C2 i ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i =
Diff C2 i · ?Mors (i + 1)

C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C2 i, DirectSumComplex C1 C2 i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
A ⟦ C2 i, DirectSumComplex C1 C2 i ⟧
 exact (to_In2 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, ι₂%abgrcat) i
· Diff (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i =
Diff C2 i · (λ i0 : hz, ι₂%abgrcat) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
(λ i : hz, ι₂%abgrcat) i
· Diff (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i =
Diff C2 i · (λ i : hz, ι₂%abgrcat) (i + 1)
 exact (DirectSumComplexIn2_comm C1 C2 i).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
let B1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i) in

  in
π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i =
BinDirectSumIndAr (Diff C1 i) (Diff C2 i) B1 B2
· π₁%abgrcat

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)

π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i = π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop B1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (Diff C1 i · (ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))
  (π₂%abgrcat
   · (Diff C2 i · (ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop B1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (Diff C1 i · (ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · identity (C2 (i + 1))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop B1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (Diff C1 i · to_unel (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))))
  (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · identity (C2 (i + 1))))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop B1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (Diff C1 i · to_unel (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))))
  (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop B1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_unel (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop B1 (C2 (i + 1)) (to_unel B1 (C2 (i + 1)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
B2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i = π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
Morphism (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) C2

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
Morphism (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) C2

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ DirectSumComplex C1 C2 i, C2 i ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff C2 i =
Diff (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ DirectSumComplex C1 C2 i, C2 i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
A ⟦ DirectSumComplex C1 C2 i, C2 i ⟧
 exact (to_Pr2 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, π₂%abgrcat) i · Diff C2 i =
Diff (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i
· (λ i0 : hz, π₂%abgrcat) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
(λ i : hz, π₂%abgrcat) i · Diff C2 i =
Diff (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i
· (λ i : hz, π₂%abgrcat) (i + 1)
 exact (DirectSumComplexPr2_comm C1 C2 i).
  Defined.

  (** The equations for composing in1, in2, pr1, and pr2. *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
IdMor C1 =
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
IdMor C1 =
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
IdMor C1 i =
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2) i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
IdMor C1 i =
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
identity (C1 i) = ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
identity (C1 i) = ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
identity (C1 i) = identity (C1 i)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
IdMor C2 =
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
IdMor C2 =
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
IdMor C2 i =
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2) i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
IdMor C2 i =
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
identity (C2 i) = ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
identity (C2 i) = ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
identity (C2 i) = identity (C2 i)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2) = ZeroMorphism C1 C2

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2) = ZeroMorphism C1 C2

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2) i = ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2) i = ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
to_unel (C1 i) (C2 i) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)

    apply PreAdditive_unel_zero.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2) = ZeroMorphism C2 C1

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2) = ZeroMorphism C2 C1

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2) i = ZeroMorphism C2 C1 i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2) i = ZeroMorphism C2 C1 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (C1 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (C1 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
to_unel (C2 i) (C1 i) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (C1 i)

    apply PreAdditive_unel_zero.
  Qed.

  (** Additition of morphisms is pointwise addition *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M1 i) (M2 i) · Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i
· to_binop (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)) (M1 (i + 1))
    (M2 (i + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M1 i) (M2 i) · Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i
· to_binop (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)) (M1 (i + 1))
    (M2 (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) (M1 i · Diff C2 i)
  (M2 i · Diff C2 i) =
Diff C1 i
· to_binop (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)) (M1 (i + 1))
    (M2 (i + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) (M1 i · Diff C2 i)
  (M2 i · Diff C2 i) =
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) (Diff C1 i · M1 (i + 1))
  (Diff C1 i · M2 (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) (Diff C1 i · M1 (i + 1))
  (M2 i · Diff C2 i) =
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) (Diff C1 i · M1 (i + 1))
  (Diff C1 i · M2 (i + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) (Diff C1 i · M1 (i + 1))
  (Diff C1 i · M2 (i + 1)) =
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 (i + 1)) (Diff C1 i · M1 (i + 1))
  (Diff C1 i · M2 (i + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
Morphism C1 C2

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
Morphism C1 C2

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
 exact (to_binop _ _ (M1 i) (M2 i)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, to_binop (C1 i0) (C2 i0) (M1 i0) (M2 i0))
  i · Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i
· (λ i0 : hz, to_binop (C1 i0) (C2 i0) (M1 i0) (M2 i0))
    (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
(λ i : hz, to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M1 i) (M2 i)) i
· Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i
· (λ i : hz, to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M1 i) (M2 i))
    (i + 1)
 exact (MorphismOpComm M1 M2 i).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isassoc MorphismOp

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isassoc MorphismOp

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2, M3: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
MorphismOp (MorphismOp M1 M2) M3 =
MorphismOp M1 (MorphismOp M2 M3)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2, M3: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
MorphismOp (MorphismOp M1 M2) M3 i =
MorphismOp M1 (MorphismOp M2 M3) i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2, M3: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
MorphismOp (MorphismOp M1 M2) M3 i =
MorphismOp M1 (MorphismOp M2 M3) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2, M3: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i)
  (to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M1 i) (M2 i)) (M3 i) =
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M1 i)
  (to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M2 i) (M3 i))

    apply (assocax (to_abgr (C1 i) (C2 i))).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex

i: hz

  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)) (M i) =
M i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (to_unel (C1 i) (C2 i)) (M i) =
M i

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
M i = M i
 apply idpath.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M i)
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)) = 
M i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M i) (to_unel (C1 i) (C2 i)) =
M i

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
M i = M i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (M i) · Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i · to_inv (M (i + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (M i) · Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i · to_inv (M (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (M i · Diff C2 i) =
Diff C1 i · to_inv (M (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (M i · Diff C2 i) =
to_inv (Diff C1 i · M (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (to_inv (M i · Diff C2 i)) =
to_inv (to_inv (Diff C1 i · M (i + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
M i · Diff C2 i =
to_inv (to_inv (Diff C1 i · M (i + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
M i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · M (i + 1)

    exact (MComm M i).
  Qed.

C1, C2: Complex

∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
 exact (to_inv (M i)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, to_inv (M i0)) i · Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i · (λ i0 : hz, to_inv (M i0)) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
(λ i : hz, to_inv (M i)) i · Diff C2 i =
Diff C1 i · (λ i : hz, to_inv (M i)) (i + 1)
 exact (MorphismOp_inv_comm M i).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
MorphismOp (MorphismOp_inv H) H = ZeroMorphism C1 C2

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
MorphismOp (MorphismOp_inv H) H i =
ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
MorphismOp (MorphismOp_inv H) H i =
ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (to_inv (H i)) (H i) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
to_unel (C1 i) (C2 i) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)

      apply PreAdditive_unel_zero.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isrinv MorphismOp (ZeroMorphism C1 C2) MorphismOp_inv
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
MorphismOp H (MorphismOp_inv H) = ZeroMorphism C1 C2

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
MorphismOp H (MorphismOp_inv H) i =
ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
MorphismOp H (MorphismOp_inv H) i =
ZeroMorphism C1 C2 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (H i) (to_inv (H i)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
H: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
to_unel (C1 i) (C2 i) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)

      apply PreAdditive_unel_zero.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
iscomm MorphismOp

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
iscomm MorphismOp

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
MorphismOp M1 M2 = MorphismOp M2 M1

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
∏ i : hz, MorphismOp M1 M2 i = MorphismOp M2 M1 i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
MorphismOp M1 M2 i = MorphismOp M2 M1 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
M1, M2: Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M1 i) (M2 i) =
to_binop (C1 i) (C2 i) (M2 i) (M1 i)

    apply (commax (to_abgr (C1 i) (C2 i)) (MMor M1 i) (MMor M2 i)).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isabgrop MorphismOp

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isabgrop MorphismOp

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isgrop MorphismOp
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
iscomm MorphismOp

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isgrop MorphismOp
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
ismonoidop MorphismOp
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
invstruct MorphismOp ?is1

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
ismonoidop MorphismOp
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isassoc MorphismOp
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isunital MorphismOp

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isassoc MorphismOp
 exact (MorphismOp_isassoc C1 C2).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isunital MorphismOp
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isunit MorphismOp ?un0

          
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
 exact (ZeroMorphism C1 C2).
          
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
isunit MorphismOp (ZeroMorphism C1 C2)
 exact (MorphismOp_isunit C1 C2).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
invstruct MorphismOp
  (MorphismOp_isassoc C1 C2,,
   make_isunital (ZeroMorphism C1 C2)
     (MorphismOp_isunit C1 C2))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
Morphisms_hSet C1 C2 → Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
(λ inv0 : Morphisms_hSet C1 C2 → Morphisms_hSet C1 C2,
 isinv MorphismOp
   (unel_is
      (MorphismOp_isassoc C1 C2,,
       make_isunital (ZeroMorphism C1 C2)
         (MorphismOp_isunit C1 C2))) inv0) ?pr1

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
Morphisms_hSet C1 C2 → Morphisms_hSet C1 C2
 exact MorphismOp_inv.
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
(λ inv0 : Morphisms_hSet C1 C2 → Morphisms_hSet C1 C2,
 isinv MorphismOp
   (unel_is
      (MorphismOp_isassoc C1 C2,,
       make_isunital (ZeroMorphism C1 C2)
         (MorphismOp_isunit C1 C2))) inv0)
  MorphismOp_inv
 exact (MorphismOp_isinv C1 C2).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
iscomm MorphismOp
 exact (MorphismOp_iscomm C1 C2).
  Defined.

  (** pr1 · in1 + pr2 · in2 = id *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
MorphismOp
  (MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2)
     (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2))
  (MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2)
     (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)) =
IdMor (DirectSumComplex C1 C2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
MorphismOp
  (MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2)
     (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2))
  (MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2)
     (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)) =
IdMor (DirectSumComplex C1 C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
∏ i : hz,
MorphismOp
  (MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2)
     (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2))
  (MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2)
     (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)) i =
IdMor (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
MorphismOp
  (MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexPr1 C1 C2)
     (DirectSumComplexIn1 C1 C2))
  (MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexPr2 C1 C2)
     (DirectSumComplexIn2 C1 C2)) i =
IdMor (DirectSumComplex C1 C2) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))
  (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat) (π₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat) =
identity (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex
i: hz
B:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (C2 i)
to_binop B B (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (π₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat) = identity B

    apply (to_BinOpId B).
  Qed.

End def_complexes.
Arguments Diff [A] _ _.
Arguments ZeroComplex {A}.
Arguments Morphism [A] _ _.
Arguments MorphismEq [A] [C1] [C2] _ _ _.
Arguments MorphismFromZero [A] _.
Arguments MorphismToZero [A] _.
Arguments MMor [A] [C1] [C2] _ _.
Arguments MComm [A] [C1] [C2] _ _.
Arguments IdMor [A] _.
Arguments MorphismComp [A] [C1] [C2] [C3] _ _.


(** * Transport of morphisms indexed by integers *)
Section transport_section'.

  Variable C : precategory.

  
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i, i': hz
e1: i = i'
H i' =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i' + n) ⟧)
  (maponpaths f e1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
     (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus e1 n)) (H i))

  
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i, i': hz
e1: i = i'
H i' =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i' + n) ⟧)
  (maponpaths f e1)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
     (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus e1 n)) (H i))

    
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i: hz
H i =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i + n) ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (idpath i))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
     (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus (idpath i) n))
     (H i))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i, i': hz
e1: i = i'
H i' =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i'))
  (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus e1 n))
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i + n) ⟧)
     (maponpaths f e1) (H i))

  
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i, i': hz
e1: i = i'
H i' =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i'))
  (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus e1 n))
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i + n) ⟧)
     (maponpaths f e1) (H i))

    
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i: hz
H i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus (idpath i) n))
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i + n) ⟧)
     (maponpaths f (idpath i)) (H i))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i, i': hz
e1: i = i'
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus e1 n)) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i' + n) ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! e1)) (H i')

  
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i, i': hz
e1: i = i'
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus e1 n)) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i' + n) ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! e1)) (H i')

    
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f (i + n) ⟧
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths f (maponpaths_2 hzplus (idpath i) n))
  (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f (i + n) ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! idpath i)) (H i)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f (i + n), f i ⟧
i, i': hz
e1: i + n = i' + n
e2: i = i'
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f (i + n)))
  (maponpaths f e2) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f i' ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! e1)) (H i')

  
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f (i + n), f i ⟧
i, i': hz
e1: i + n = i' + n
e2: i = i'
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f (i + n)))
  (maponpaths f e2) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f i' ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! e1)) (H i')

    
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f (i + n), f i ⟧
i: hz
e1: i + n = i + n
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f (i + n)))
  (maponpaths f (idpath i)) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f i ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! e1)) (H i)
 
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f (i + n), f i ⟧
i: hz
e1: i + n = i + n
e: e1 = idpath (i + n)
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f (i + n)))
  (maponpaths f (idpath i)) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f i ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! e1)) (H i)
 
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f (i + n), f i ⟧
i: hz
e1: i + n = i + n
e: e1 = idpath (i + n)
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f (i + n)))
  (maponpaths f (idpath i)) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f i ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! idpath (i + n))) (H i)
 
C: precategory
f: hz → C
n: hz
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f (i + n), f i ⟧
i: hz
e1: i + n = i + n
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f (i + n)))
  (maponpaths f (idpath i)) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f i ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! idpath (i + n))) (H i)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: precategory
f, f': hz → C
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f' i ⟧
i, i': hz
e: i = i'
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths f' e) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f' i' ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! e)) (H i')

  
C: precategory
f, f': hz → C
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f' i ⟧
i, i': hz
e: i = i'
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths f' e) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f' i' ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! e)) (H i')

    
C: precategory
f, f': hz → C
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f' i ⟧
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths f' (idpath i)) (H i) =
transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f' i ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (! idpath i)) (H i)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: precategory
f, f': hz → C
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f' i ⟧
i, i': hz
e: i = i'
H i' =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i'))
  (maponpaths f' e)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f' i ⟧)
     (maponpaths f e) (H i))

  
C: precategory
f, f': hz → C
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f' i ⟧
i, i': hz
e: i = i'
H i' =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i'))
  (maponpaths f' e)
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f' i ⟧)
     (maponpaths f e) (H i))

    
C: precategory
f, f': hz → C
H: ∏ i : hz, C ⟦ f i, f' i ⟧
i: hz
H i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths f' (idpath i))
  (transportf (λ x : C, C ⟦ x, f' i ⟧)
     (maponpaths f (idpath i)) (H i))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

End transport_section'.


Section acyclic_complexes.

  Variable A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure.

  (** ** Construction of a complexes with one object *)
  (** ... -> 0 -> X -> 0 -> ... *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
hz → A

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
hz → A

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i, i0: hz
A

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
A

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
A
 exact X.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
A
 exact (Additive.to_Zero A).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0,
ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1) ⟧

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0,
ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1) ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i, i0: hz
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0,
ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1) ⟧

    exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0)
                     (ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1))).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
ComplexFromObject_mors X i i0
· ComplexFromObject_mors X i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0)
  (ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1 + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
ComplexFromObject_mors X i i0
· ComplexFromObject_mors X i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0)
  (ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i, i0: hz
ComplexFromObject_mors X i i0
· ComplexFromObject_mors X i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0)
  (ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1 + 1))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
Complex A

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
Complex A

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
hz → A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz, A ⟦ ?D i0, ?D (i0 + 1) ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
?D' i0 · ?D' (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (?D i0)
  (?D (i0 + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
hz → A
 exact (ComplexFromObject_obs X i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0,
ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1) ⟧
 exact (ComplexFromObject_mors X i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
X: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
ComplexFromObject_mors X i i0
· ComplexFromObject_mors X i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (ComplexFromObject_obs X i i0)
  (ComplexFromObject_obs X i (i0 + 1 + 1))
 exact (ComplexFromObject_comm X i).
  Defined.

  (** A morphism in A induces a morphisms of ComplexFromObjects *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject a i i0, ComplexFromObject b i i0
⟧

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject a i i0, ComplexFromObject b i i0
⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject a i i0, ComplexFromObject b i i0
⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
A
⟦ make_Complex A (ComplexFromObject_obs a i)
    (ComplexFromObject_mors a i)
    (ComplexFromObject_comm a i) i0,
make_Complex A (ComplexFromObject_obs b i)
  (ComplexFromObject_mors b i)
  (ComplexFromObject_comm b i) i0 ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject_obs a i i0,
ComplexFromObject_obs b i i0 ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
A
⟦ coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
    (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
    (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
    (isdecrelhzeq i i0),
coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
  (λ _ : hzeq i i0, b)
  (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
  (isdecrelhzeq i i0) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
A
⟦ coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
    (λ _ : i = i0, a)
    (λ _ : i != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
    (isdecrelhzeq i i0),
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
  (λ _ : i = i0, b)
  (λ _ : i != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
  (isdecrelhzeq i i0) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
A
⟦ match isdecrelhzeq i i0 with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end,
match isdecrelhzeq i i0 with
| inl _ => b
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
A ⟦ a, b ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A, Additive.to_Zero A ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
A ⟦ a, b ⟧
 exact f.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A, Additive.to_Zero A ⟧
 apply (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i i0
· Diff (ComplexFromObject b i) i0 =
Diff (ComplexFromObject a i) i0
· ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i (i0 + 1)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i i0
· Diff (ComplexFromObject b i) i0 =
Diff (ComplexFromObject a i) i0
· ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i i0
· Diff (ComplexFromObject b i) i0 =
Diff (ComplexFromObject a i) i0
· ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i i0
· Diff
    (make_Complex A (ComplexFromObject_obs b i)
       (ComplexFromObject_mors b i)
       (ComplexFromObject_comm b i)) i0 =
Diff
  (make_Complex A (ComplexFromObject_obs a i)
     (ComplexFromObject_mors a i)
     (ComplexFromObject_comm a i)) i0
· ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i (i0 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i i0
· Diff
    (make_Complex A (ComplexFromObject_obs b i)
       (λ i0 : hz,
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (ComplexFromObject_obs b i i0)
          (ComplexFromObject_obs b i (i0 + 1)))
       (ComplexFromObject_comm b i)) i0 =
Diff
  (make_Complex A (ComplexFromObject_obs a i)
     (λ i0 : hz,
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (ComplexFromObject_obs a i i0)
        (ComplexFromObject_obs a i (i0 + 1)))
     (ComplexFromObject_comm a i)) i0
· ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i (i0 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i i0
· Diff
    (make_Complex A
       (λ i0 : hz,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
          (λ _ : hzeq i i0, b)
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
          (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
       (λ i0 : hz,
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (coprod_rect
             (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
             (λ _ : hzeq i i0, b)
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
             (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
          (coprod_rect
             (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1), A)
             (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1), b)
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
              Additive.to_Zero A)
             (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1))))
       (ComplexFromObject_comm b i)) i0 =
Diff
  (make_Complex A
     (λ i0 : hz,
      coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
        (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
        (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
     (λ i0 : hz,
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
           (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
           (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
            A) (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1), a)
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
            Additive.to_Zero A)
           (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1))))
     (ComplexFromObject_comm a i)) i0
· ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i (i0 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i i0
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
       (λ _ : i = i0, b)
       (λ _ : i != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
    (coprod_rect
       (λ _ : (i = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i != i0 + 1), A)
       (λ _ : i = i0 + 1, b)
       (λ _ : i != i0 + 1, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
     (λ _ : i = i0, a)
     (λ _ : i != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i != i0 + 1), A)
     (λ _ : i = i0 + 1, a)
     (λ _ : i != i0 + 1, Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
· ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
coprod_rect
  (λ c : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0,
   A
   ⟦ match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end,
   match c with
   | inl _ => b
   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
   end ⟧) (λ _ : hzeq i i0, f)
  (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
     (Additive.to_Zero A)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
       (λ _ : i = i0, b)
       (λ _ : i != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
    (coprod_rect
       (λ _ : (i = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i != i0 + 1), A)
       (λ _ : i = i0 + 1, b)
       (λ _ : i != i0 + 1, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
     (λ _ : i = i0, a)
     (λ _ : i != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i != i0 + 1), A)
     (λ _ : i = i0 + 1, a)
     (λ _ : i != i0 + 1, Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
     A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end,
     match c with
     | inl _ => b
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end ⟧) (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1), f)
    (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
     ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
       (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A))
    (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0),
   A
   ⟦ match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end,
   match c with
   | inl _ => b
   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
   end ⟧) (λ _ : i = i0, f)
  (λ _ : i != i0,
   ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
     (Additive.to_Zero A)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
       (λ _ : i = i0, b)
       (λ _ : i != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
    (coprod_rect
       (λ _ : (i = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i != i0 + 1), A)
       (λ _ : i = i0 + 1, b)
       (λ _ : i != i0 + 1, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
     (λ _ : i = i0, a)
     (λ _ : i != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i != i0 + 1), A)
     (λ _ : i = i0 + 1, a)
     (λ _ : i != i0 + 1, Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : (i = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i != i0 + 1),
     A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end,
     match c with
     | inl _ => b
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end ⟧) (λ _ : i = i0 + 1, f)
    (λ _ : i != i0 + 1,
     ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
       (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A))
    (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
match
  isdecrelhzeq i i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end,
     match c with
     | inl _ => b
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end ⟧)
with
| inl _ => f
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
    match isdecrelhzeq i i0 with
    | inl _ => b
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end
    match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
    | inl _ => b
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  match isdecrelhzeq i i0 with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end,
       match c with
       | inl _ => b
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl _ => f
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
f
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) b
    match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
    | inl _ => b
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end,
       match c with
       | inl _ => b
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl _ => f
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end

i, i0: hz

  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
    | inl _ => b
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end
· match

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
f
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) b
    match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
    | inl _ => b
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end,
       match c with
       | inl _ => b
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
