  end
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
f · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) b b =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a a · f
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
f
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) b
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (Additive.to_Zero A)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
f · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) b b =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a a · f
 apply (fromempty (hzeqeisi e e')).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
f
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) b
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (Additive.to_Zero A)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
f
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) b
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (Additive.to_Zero A)
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
    | inl _ => b
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end,
       match c with
       | inl _ => b
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl _ => f
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    b =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) a
· f

· f

i, i0: hz

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) b =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) b
 apply idpath.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)

    (Additive.to_Zero A)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
Morphism (ComplexFromObject a i)
  (ComplexFromObject b i)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
Morphism (ComplexFromObject a i)
  (ComplexFromObject b i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject a i i0, ComplexFromObject b i i0
⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
?Mors i0 · Diff (ComplexFromObject b i) i0 =
Diff (ComplexFromObject a i) i0 · ?Mors (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ ComplexFromObject a i i0, ComplexFromObject b i i0
⟧
 exact (ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i i0
· Diff (ComplexFromObject b i) i0 =
Diff (ComplexFromObject a i) i0
· ObjectMorToComplexMor_mors f i (i0 + 1)
 exact (ObjectMorToComplexMor_comm f i).
  Defined.


  (** ** Construction of a complex with a given object in two adjacent positions *)


  (** *** Construction of the complex ... --> 0 --> X -Id-> X --> 0 --> ... *)

a: A
i: hz
hz → A

hz → A

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
A
 exact (Additive.to_Zero A).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i i0,
AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i (i0 + 1) ⟧

a: A

a: A
i, i0: hz

AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i (i0 + 1) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
A
⟦ coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
    (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
    (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0, A)
       (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0, a)
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0),
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1), A)
  (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1), a)
  (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
            ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1), A)
     (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1), a)
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
      Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
  (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
A
⟦ coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
    (λ _ : i = i0, a)
    (λ _ : i != i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ _ : (i + 1 = i0) ⨿ (i + 1 != i0), A)
       (λ _ : i + 1 = i0, a)
       (λ _ : i + 1 != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0),
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i != i0 + 1), A)
  (λ _ : i = i0 + 1, a)
  (λ _ : i != i0 + 1,
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (i + 1 = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i + 1 != i0 + 1), A)
     (λ _ : i + 1 = i0 + 1, a)
     (λ _ : i + 1 != i0 + 1, Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
  (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
A
⟦ match isdecrelhzeq i i0 with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end
  end,
match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
    match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
    | inl _ => a
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end
end ⟧

e: hzeq i i0

match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
    match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
    | inl _ => a
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end
end ⟧

⟦ match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end,
match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with

 exact (fromempty (hzeqeisi e e')).

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e'': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)

 exact (identity a).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n'': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
A ⟦ a, Additive.to_Zero A ⟧
 exact (fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n'')).

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
e': hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
A ⟦ a, Additive.to_Zero A ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (Additive.to_Zero A)).

a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0

n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e''': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A, a ⟧
 exact (fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e''')).
           
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A, Additive.to_Zero A ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i i0
· AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i i0)
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i (i0 + 1 + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i i0
· AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i i0)
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i (i0 + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i i0
· AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i i0)
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i (i0 + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i i0
· AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
     (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0, A)
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0, a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
        (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
            ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1), A)
     (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1), a)
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
               ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1), A)
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1), a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
         Additive.to_Zero A)
        (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)))
     (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
coprod_rect
  (λ c : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0,
   A
   ⟦ match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end,
   match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
   | inl _ => a
   | inr _ =>
       match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end
   end ⟧)
  (λ e : hzeq i i0,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
      A ⟦ a,
      match c with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ =>
          match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
          end
      end ⟧)
     (λ e' : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
      fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
      coprod_rect
        (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
               ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
         A ⟦ a,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end ⟧)
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1), identity a)
        (λ n'' : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
         fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
        (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
     (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
  (λ n : ¬ hzeq i i0,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      A
      ⟦ match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
        end,
      match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ =>
          match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
          end
      end ⟧)
     (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      coprod_rect
        (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
         A ⟦ a,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
        (λ e'' : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
         fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                  ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
            A ⟦ a,
            match c with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end ⟧)
           (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
            fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
            ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
              (Additive.to_Zero A))
           (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
        (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      coprod_rect
        (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
         A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
        (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
         ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
           (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                  ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
            A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
            match c with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end ⟧)
           (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
            fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
            ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
              (Additive.to_Zero A)
              (Additive.to_Zero A))
           (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
        (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
     (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0)
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
     A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end,
     match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
    (λ e : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
              ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
        A ⟦ a,
        match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ =>
            match
              isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
            with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
        fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
                 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
           A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
          (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1), identity a)
          (λ n'' : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
           fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)))
       (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)))
    (λ n : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
              ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
        A
        ⟦ match c with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
          end,
        match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ =>
            match
              isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
            with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
                 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
           A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ e'' : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
           fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
              A ⟦ a,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end ⟧)
             (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
              fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                (Additive.to_Zero A))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)))
          (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)))
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
                 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
           A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
           ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
             (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
              A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end ⟧)
             (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
              fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)))
          (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
    (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
     (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0, A)
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0, a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
        (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
            ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1), A)
     (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1), a)
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1),
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
               ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1), A)
        (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1), a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1),
         Additive.to_Zero A)
        (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)))
     (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
match
  isdecrelhzeq i i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end,
     match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
      return
        (A ⟦ a,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
    with
    | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
    | inr _ =>
        match
          isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
          return
            (A ⟦ a,
             match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end ⟧)
        with
        | inl _ => identity a
        | inr b0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr a0 b0)
        end
    end
| inr b =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
      return
        (A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end,
         match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 =>
        match
          isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c

            (A ⟦ a,
             match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ =>
                 match
                   isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                 with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end
             end ⟧)
        with
        | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
        | inr _ =>
            match
              isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
              return
                (A ⟦ a,
                 match c with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end ⟧)
            with
            | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
            | inr _ =>
                ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                  (Additive.to_Zero A)
            end
        end
    | inr _ =>
        match
          isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
          return
            (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
             match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ =>
                 match
                   isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                 with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end
             end ⟧)
        with
        | inl _ =>
            ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
              (Additive.to_Zero A) a
        | inr _ =>
            match
              isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
              return
                (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                 match c with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end ⟧)
            with
            | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' b a0)
            | inr _ =>
                ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                  (Additive.to_Zero A)
                  (Additive.to_Zero A)
            end
        end
    end
end

e'': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
e''': hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
identity a · fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e'' e''') =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a a
 exact (fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e'' e''')).
          
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e'': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
identity a
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ a,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqeisi e'' a0)
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
        (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
  match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
  end

a: A

e: hzeq i i0

e'': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
n'''': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)

· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e'': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
e'''': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e'': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
n'''': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
identity a
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (Additive.to_Zero A)
 exact (ZeroArrow_comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n'': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n'')
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) a
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n' a0)
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
            (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end
  end
 exact (fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n'')).

         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end,
       match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl _ => identity a
          | inr b0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr a0 b0)
          end
      end
  | inr b =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end,
           match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ a,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
              | inr _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
              end
          end
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl _ =>
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A) a
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a0 =>
                  fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' b a0)
              | inr _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
              end
          end
      end
  end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end
  end

  | inr _ =>

        return

  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a

e5: hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)

· fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n'' e5) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a a

n5: ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
match
  isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
  return
    (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
with
| inl _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) a
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
      return
        (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n a0)
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    end
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end,
       match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl _ => identity a
          | inr b0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr a0 b0)
          end
      end
  | inr b =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end,
           match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ a,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
              | inr _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
              end
          end
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl _ =>
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A) a
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a0 =>
                  fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' b a0)
              | inr _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
              end
          end
      end
  end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end
  end

  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end
  end
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n3: ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) a
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n'' a0)
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
            (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end
  end

          
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e3: hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e3)
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ a,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e3 a0)
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqeisi e3 a0)
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
            (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  end =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1) with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end
  end
 exact (fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e3)).

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n3: ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
e4: hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)

· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    a =

 exact (ZeroArrow_comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _).

n3: ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
n4: ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i, i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n3: ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
n4: ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1 + 1)
n5: ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
 exact (ZeroArrow_comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _).
  Qed.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i: hz
hz → A
 exact (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i i0,
AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i (i0 + 1) ⟧
 exact (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
i: hz
∏ i0 : hz,
AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i i0
· AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i (i0 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i i0)
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i (i0 + 1 + 1))
 exact (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i).
  Defined.

  (** *** Morphism from [AcyclicComplexFromObject] to a complex
                           ... -->   0   -->  X^i  -->  X^i   -->   0    -->   ...
                                     |         |         |          |
                           .. --> X^{i-1} --> X^i --> X^{i+1} --> X^{i+2} -->  ...
   *)

C: Complex A
i: hz

a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
A
⟦ make_Complex A (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i)
    (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i)
    (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i) i0, C i0 ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
A
⟦ make_Complex A
    (λ i0 : hz,
     coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
       (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
        coprod_rect
          (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
           A) (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0, a)
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
          (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0))
       (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
    (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i)
    (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i) i0, C i0 ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
A
⟦ make_Complex A
    (λ i0 : hz,
     coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
       (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
        coprod_rect
          (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
           A) (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0, a)
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
          (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0))
       (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
    (λ i0 : hz,
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0,
        A
        ⟦ match c with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ =>
              match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end
          end,
        match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ =>
            match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end
        end ⟧)
       (λ e : hzeq i i0,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
           A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ e' : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
           fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
              A ⟦ a,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end ⟧)
             (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1), identity a)
             (λ n'' : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
              fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
          (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
       (λ n : ¬ hzeq i i0,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
           A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end,
           match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i0,
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
              A ⟦ a,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ =>
                  match
                    isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                  with
                  | inl _ => a
                  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                  end
              end ⟧)
             (λ e'' : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
              fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
              coprod_rect
                (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                       ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 A ⟦ a,
                 match c with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end ⟧)
                (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
                (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                   (Additive.to_Zero A))
                (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
             (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
              A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ =>
                  match
                    isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                  with
                  | inl _ => a
                  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                  end
              end ⟧)
             (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
              coprod_rect
                (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                       ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                 match c with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end ⟧)
                (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
                (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                   (Additive.to_Zero A)
                   (Additive.to_Zero A))
                (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
             (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0))
       (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
    (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i) i0, C i0 ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
A
⟦ coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
    (λ _ : i = i0, a)
    (λ _ : i != i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ _ : (i + 1 = i0) ⨿ (i + 1 != i0), A)
       (λ _ : i + 1 = i0, a)
       (λ _ : i + 1 != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
       (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0),
C i0 ⟧

⟦ match isdecrelhzeq i i0 with
  | inl _ => a
  | inr _ =>
      match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end
  end, C i0 ⟧

 exact (transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e) f).

n: ¬ hzeq i i0
e': hzeq (i + 1) i0
A ⟦ a, C i0 ⟧
 exact (transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e') (f · Diff C i)).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A, C i0 ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
identity a
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e'') (f · Diff C i)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
identity a
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e'') (f · Diff C i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C e'') (f · Diff C i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
f
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C i))
    (maponpaths C e'') (Diff C i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
f
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C e) (Diff C i0) =
f
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C i))
    (maponpaths C e'') (Diff C i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  (! maponpaths C e) (Diff C i0) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C i))
  (maponpaths C e'') (Diff C i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (! e)) (Diff C i0) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C i))
  (maponpaths C e'') (Diff C i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C i))
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e 1)) (Diff C i) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C i))
  (maponpaths C e'') (Diff C i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e 1) =
maponpaths C e''
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: i = i0
e'': i + 1 = i0 + 1
maponpaths_2 hzplus e 1 = e''
 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e')
  (f · Diff C i) · Diff C i0 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i0 + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e')
  (f · Diff C i) · Diff C i0 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i0 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e')
  (f · Diff C i) · Diff C i0 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e')
  (f · Diff C i)
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
    (maponpaths C e')
    (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1)))
       (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
       (Diff C (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
f · Diff C i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1)))
    (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
    (Diff C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (f · Diff C i · Diff C (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (f · (Diff C i · Diff C (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (f
   · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i)
       (C (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e': i + 1 = i0
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a (C (i0 + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0 · Diff C i0 =
Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a i) i0
· FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0 · Diff C i0 =
Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a i) i0
· FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0 · Diff C i0 =
Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a i) i0
· FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0 · Diff C i0 =
Diff
  (make_Complex A (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a i)
     (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i)
     (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i)) i0
· FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0 · Diff C i0 =
Diff
  (make_Complex A
     (λ i0 : hz,
      coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
        (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            A) (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0, a)
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            Additive.to_Zero A)
           (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0))
        (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
     (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a i)
     (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i)) i0
· FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0 · Diff C i0 =
Diff
  (make_Complex A
     (λ i0 : hz,
      coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
        (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            A) (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0, a)
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            Additive.to_Zero A)
           (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0))
        (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
     (λ i0 : hz,
      coprod_rect
        (λ c : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0,
         A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end,
         match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
        (λ e : hzeq i i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
            A ⟦ a,
            match c with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ =>
                match
                  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                with
                | inl _ => a
                | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                end
            end ⟧)
           (λ e' : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
            fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
            coprod_rect
              (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                     ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
               A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
              (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1), identity a)
              (λ n'' : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
               fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
              (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
           (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
        (λ n : ¬ hzeq i i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            A
            ⟦ match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end,
            match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ =>
                match
                  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                with
                | inl _ => a
                | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                end
            end ⟧)
           (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            coprod_rect
              (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1)
                     ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
              (λ e'' : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
              (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               coprod_rect
                 (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                        ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  A ⟦ a,
                  match c with
                  | inl _ => a
                  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                  end ⟧)
                 (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
                 (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                    (Additive.to_Zero A))
                 (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
              (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            coprod_rect
              (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1)
                     ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
              (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                 (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
              (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               coprod_rect
                 (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                        ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                  match c with
                  | inl _ => a
                  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                  end ⟧)
                 (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
                 (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A))
                 (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
              (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
           (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0))
        (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
     (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i)) i0
· FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
coprod_rect
  (λ c : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0,
   A
   ⟦ match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end, C i0 ⟧)
  (λ e : hzeq i i0,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
     (maponpaths C e) f)
  (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      A
      ⟦ match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
        end, C i0 ⟧)
     (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C e') (f · Diff C i))
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0))
     (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0)
· Diff C i0 =
Diff
  (make_Complex A
     (λ i0 : hz,
      coprod_rect (λ _ : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0, A)
        (λ _ : hzeq i i0, a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            A) (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) i0, a)
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            Additive.to_Zero A)
           (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0))
        (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
     (λ i0 : hz,
      coprod_rect
        (λ c : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0,
         A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end,
         match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
        (λ e : hzeq i i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
            A ⟦ a,
            match c with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ =>
                match
                  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                with
                | inl _ => a
                | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                end
            end ⟧)
           (λ e' : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
            fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
            coprod_rect
              (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                     ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
               A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
              (λ _ : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1), identity a)
              (λ n'' : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
               fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
              (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
           (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
        (λ n : ¬ hzeq i i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            A
            ⟦ match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end,
            match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ =>
                match
                  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                with
                | inl _ => a
                | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                end
            end ⟧)
           (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            coprod_rect
              (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1)
                     ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
              (λ e'' : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
              (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               coprod_rect
                 (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                        ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  A ⟦ a,
                  match c with
                  | inl _ => a
                  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                  end ⟧)
                 (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
                 (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                    (Additive.to_Zero A))
                 (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
              (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
            coprod_rect
              (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1)
                     ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
              (λ _ : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                 (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
              (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
               coprod_rect
                 (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                        ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                  match c with
                  | inl _ => a
                  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                  end ⟧)
                 (λ e''' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
                 (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A))
                 (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
              (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1)))
           (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0))
        (isdecrelhzeq i i0))
     (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i)) i0
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : hzeq i (i0 + 1) ⨿ ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
     A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
    (λ e : hzeq i (i0 + 1),
     transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
       (maponpaths C e) f)
    (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1),
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
              ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
        A
        ⟦ match c with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
          end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
       (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
        transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
          (maponpaths C e') (f · Diff C i))
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1),
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1)))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)))
    (isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
match
  isdecrelhzeq i i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end, C i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C a0) f
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
      return
        (A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end, C i0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 =>
        transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
          (maponpaths C a0) (f · Diff C i)
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
    end
end · Diff C i0 =
Diff
  (make_Complex A
     (λ i0 : hz,
      match isdecrelhzeq i i0 with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ =>
          match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
          end
      end)
     (λ i0 : hz,
      match
        isdecrelhzeq i i0 as c
        return
          (A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ =>
                 match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end
             end,
           match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ a,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl _ => identity a
              | inr b0 =>
                  fromempty (hzeqnmplusr a0 b0)
              end
          end
      | inr b =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
            return
              (A
               ⟦ match c with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end,
               match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a0 =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ a,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ =>
                       match
                         isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                       with
                       | inl _ => a
                       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                       end
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
              | inr _ =>
                  match
                    isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
                    return
                      (A ⟦ a,
                       match c with
                       | inl _ => a
                       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                       end ⟧)
                  with
                  | inl a1 =>
                      fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
                  | inr _ =>
                      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                        (Additive.to_Zero A)
                  end
              end
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ =>
                       match
                         isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
                       with
                       | inl _ => a
                       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                       end
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A) a
              | inr _ =>
                  match
                    isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
                    return
                      (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                       match c with
                       | inl _ => a
                       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                       end ⟧)
                  with
                  | inl a0 =>
                      fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' b a0)
                  | inr _ =>
                      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                        (Additive.to_Zero A)
                        (Additive.to_Zero A)
                  end
              end
          end
      end) (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a i)) i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C a0) f
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
            (maponpaths C a0) (f · Diff C i)
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
            (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
      end
  end

     match c with
     | inl _ => a

         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with

         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A

| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c

         match c with

         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A

    | inl _ => identity a
    | inr b0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e b0)

       ⟦ match c with

f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
fromempty (hzeqeisi e e')
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e') f
 exact (fromempty (hzeqeisi e e')).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
  return
    (A ⟦ a,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end ⟧)
with
| inl _ => identity a
| inr b => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e b)
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C a0) (f · Diff C i)
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
  end
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e'': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
identity a
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e'') (f · Diff C i)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n'': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n'')
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i0 + 1))

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e'': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
identity a
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e'') (f · Diff C i)
 exact (FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_comm_eq1 f i0 e e'').
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n'': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e)
  f · Diff C i0 =
fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n'')
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i0 + 1))
 exact (fromempty (n'' (maponpaths (λ i' : hz, i' + 1) e))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end, C i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C a0) (f · Diff C i)
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
end · Diff C i0 =
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end,
     match isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
      return
        (A ⟦ a,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
    with
    | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
    | inr _ =>
        match
          isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
          return
            (A ⟦ a,
             match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end ⟧)
        with
        | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
        | inr _ =>
            ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
              (Additive.to_Zero A)
        end
    end
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
      return
        (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
    with
    | inl _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (Additive.to_Zero A) a
    | inr _ =>
        match
          isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
          return
            (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
             match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end ⟧)
        with
        | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n a0)
        | inr _ =>
            ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
              (Additive.to_Zero A)
              (Additive.to_Zero A)
        end
    end
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C a0) f
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
            (maponpaths C a0) (f · Diff C i)
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
            (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
      end
  end
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
e': hzeq (i + 1) i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C e')
  (f · Diff C i) · Diff C i0 =
match
  isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
  return
    (A ⟦ a,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' a0)
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
      return
        (A ⟦ a,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqeisi e' a0)
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
          (Additive.to_Zero A)
    end
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq i (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) with
             | inl _ => a

             end
         end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  with

      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C a0) f
  | inr _ =>
      match

        return

           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a

             end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
      with

            (maponpaths C a0) (f · Diff C i)
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
            (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
      end
  end
