     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n a0)
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C a0) (f · Diff C i)
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
  end

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
e'': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C i0) · Diff C i0 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) a
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e'') f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
e'': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i0 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) a
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e'') f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
e'': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i0 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i0 + 1))
 apply idpath.
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C i0) · Diff C i0 =
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
  return
    (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n a0)
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end, C (i0 + 1) ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C a0) (f · Diff C i)
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
  end
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e''': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C i0) · Diff C i0 =
fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e''')
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e''') (f · Diff C i)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) 
  (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0) · 
Diff C i0 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) 
  (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) 
    (Additive.to_Zero A) 
    (C (i0 + 1))

           
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
e''': hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C i0) · Diff C i0 =
fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e''')
· transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
    (maponpaths C e''') (f · Diff C i)
 exact (fromempty (n (hzplusrcan i i0 1 e'''))).
           
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C i0) · Diff C i0 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i0 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i0 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    (C (i0 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq i i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
n'': ¬ hzeq i (i0 + 1)
n''': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) (i0 + 1)
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i0 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C (i0 + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

C: Complex A

Morphism (AcyclicComplexFromObject a i) C

C: Complex A
i: hz

Morphism (AcyclicComplexFromObject a i) C

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
∏ i0 : hz, A ⟦ AcyclicComplexFromObject a i i0, C i0 ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
?Mors i0 · Diff C i0 =
Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a i) i0
· ?Mors (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
∏ i0 : hz, A ⟦ AcyclicComplexFromObject a i i0, C i0 ⟧
 exact (FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0 · Diff C i0 =
Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a i) i0
· FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)
 exact (FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_comm f).
  Defined.

  (** *** Morphism from [AcyclicComplexFromObject] to a complex
                           .. --> X^{i-1} --> X^i --> X^{i+1} --> X^{i+2} -->  ...
                                     |         |         |          |
                           ... -->   0   -->  X^i  -->  X^i   -->   0    -->   ...
   *)

C: Complex A
i: hz

∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C i0, AcyclicComplexFromObject a (i - 1) i0 ⟧

i: hz

∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C i0, AcyclicComplexFromObject a (i - 1) i0 ⟧

C: Complex A
i: hz

i0: hz

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
A ⟦ C i0,
make_Complex A
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a (i - 1))
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a (i - 1))
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a (i - 1)) i0 ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
A ⟦ C i0,
make_Complex A
  (λ i0 : hz,
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0, A)
     (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) i0, a)
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
               ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0, A)
        (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0, a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
         Additive.to_Zero A)
        (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
     (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0))
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a (i - 1))
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a (i - 1)) i0 ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
A ⟦ C i0,
make_Complex A
  (λ i0 : hz,
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0, A)
     (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) i0, a)
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
               ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0, A)
        (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0, a)
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
         Additive.to_Zero A)
        (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
     (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0))
  (λ i0 : hz,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
      A
      ⟦ match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ =>
            match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end
        end,
      match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ =>
          match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
          end
      end ⟧)
     (λ e : hzeq (i - 1) i0,
      coprod_rect
        (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
               ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
         A ⟦ a,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match
               isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
             with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
        (λ e' : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
         fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                  ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
            A ⟦ a,
            match c with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end ⟧)
           (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
            identity a)
           (λ n'' : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
            fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
           (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
        (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
     (λ n : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
      coprod_rect
        (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
               ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
         A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end,
         match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match
               isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
             with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end ⟧)
        (λ e' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
                  ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
            A ⟦ a,
            match c with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ =>
                match
                  isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                with
                | inl _ => a
                | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                end
            end ⟧)
           (λ e'' : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
            fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
            coprod_rect
              (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                     ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
               A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
              (λ e''' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
               fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
              (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
               ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                 (Additive.to_Zero A))
              (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
           (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
        (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
         coprod_rect
           (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
                  ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
            A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
            match c with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ =>
                match
                  isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                with
                | inl _ => a
                | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                end
            end ⟧)
           (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
            ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
              (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
           (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
            coprod_rect
              (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                     ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
               A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
              (λ e''' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
               fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
              (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
               ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                 (Additive.to_Zero A)
                 (Additive.to_Zero A))
              (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
           (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
        (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
     (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0))
  (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a (i - 1)) i0 ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
A ⟦ C i0,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i - 1 = i0) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0), A)
  (λ _ : i - 1 = i0, a)
  (λ _ : i - 1 != i0,
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (i - 1 + 1 = i0) ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0), A)
     (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 = i0, a)
     (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i0, Additive.to_Zero A)
     (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
  (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0) ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
A ⟦ C i0,
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0 with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
    match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
    | inl _ => a
    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
    end
end ⟧

i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq (i - 1) i0
A ⟦ C i0, a ⟧

A ⟦ C i0,
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧

i: hz

A
 exact (C i).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq (i - 1) i0
A ⟦ C i0, C i ⟧
 exact (transportf (λ x' : ob A, A⟦x', C i⟧) (maponpaths C e)
                          (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                                      (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
                                      (Diff C (i - 1)))).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq (i - 1) i0
A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
 exact f.

A ⟦ C i0,
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A

f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧

e': hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
A ⟦ C i0, a ⟧
 exact (transportf (λ x' : ob A, A⟦x', a⟧) (maponpaths C (! (hzrminusplus i 1) @ e')) f).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
A ⟦ C i0, Additive.to_Zero A ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0) (Additive.to_Zero A)).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e: i - 1 = i0
e'': i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧) (maponpaths C e)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · f · identity a =
Diff C i0
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
    (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e'')) f

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e: i - 1 = i0
e'': i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧) (maponpaths C e)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · f · identity a =
Diff C i0
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
    (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e'')) f

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e: i - 1 = i0
e'': i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧) (maponpaths C e)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · f =
Diff C i0
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
    (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e'')) f

  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)

i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
e'': i - 1 + 1 = i - 1 + 1

  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1))) (Diff C (i - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (! (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e'')))
  (Diff C (i - 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
e'': i - 1 + 1 = i - 1 + 1
hzrminusplus i 1 = ! (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e'')
 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e': i - 1 = i0 + 1
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
    a =
Diff C i0
· (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧)
     (maponpaths C e')
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) · f)

C: Complex A
i: hz

e': i - 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i0 + 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C e')
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (! e')) (Diff C (i - 1)))

C: Complex A

f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧

e': i - 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C e') (Diff C (i - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (! maponpaths C (! e')) (Diff C (i - 1)))

  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C e') (Diff C (i - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e': i - 1 = i0 + 1
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C e') (Diff C (i - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C (maponpaths_2 hzplus e' 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C e') (Diff C (i - 1)))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0
· Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a (i - 1)) i0 =
Diff C i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0
· Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a (i - 1)) i0 =
Diff C i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0
· Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a (i - 1)) i0 =
Diff C i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0
· Diff
    (make_Complex A
       (AcyclicComplexFromObject_obs a (i - 1))
       (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a (i - 1))
       (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a (i - 1))) i0 =
Diff C i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0
· Diff
    (make_Complex A
       (λ i0 : hz,
        coprod_rect
          (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
           A) (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) i0, a)
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
           coprod_rect
             (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0, A)
             (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0, a)
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
              Additive.to_Zero A)
             (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0))
       (AcyclicComplexFromObject_mors a (i - 1))
       (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a (i - 1))) i0 =
Diff C i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0
· Diff
    (make_Complex A
       (λ i0 : hz,
        coprod_rect
          (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
           A) (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) i0, a)
          (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
           coprod_rect
             (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0, A)
             (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0, a)
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
              Additive.to_Zero A)
             (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0))
       (λ i0 : hz,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
           A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ =>
                 match
                   isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
                 with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end
             end,
           match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ e : hzeq (i - 1) i0,
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
              A ⟦ a,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ =>
                  match
                    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                  with
                  | inl _ => a
                  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                  end
              end ⟧)
             (λ e' : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
              fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
              coprod_rect
                (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                       ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 A ⟦ a,
                 match c with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                 end ⟧)
                (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 identity a)
                (λ n'' : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
                 fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
                (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
          (λ n : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
                    ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
              A
              ⟦ match c with
                | inl _ => a
                | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                end,
              match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ =>
                  match
                    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                  with
                  | inl _ => a
                  | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                  end
              end ⟧)
             (λ e' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
              coprod_rect
                (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
                       ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
                 A ⟦ a,
                 match c with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ =>
                     match
                       isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1)
                         (i0 + 1)
                     with
                     | inl _ => a
                     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                     end
                 end ⟧)
                (λ e'' : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
                 fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
                (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
                 coprod_rect
                   (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                          ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1)
                                (i0 + 1),
                    A ⟦ a,
                    match c with
                    | inl _ => a
                    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                    end ⟧)
                   (λ e''' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
                    fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
                   (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
                    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                      (Additive.to_Zero A))
                   (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
                (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
             (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
              coprod_rect
                (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
                       ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
                 A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                 match c with
                 | inl _ => a
                 | inr _ =>
                     match
                       isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1)
                         (i0 + 1)
                     with
                     | inl _ => a
                     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                     end
                 end ⟧)
                (λ _ : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
                 ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                   (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
                (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
                 coprod_rect
                   (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                          ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1)
                                (i0 + 1),
                    A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                    match c with
                    | inl _ => a
                    | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                    end ⟧)
                   (λ e''' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
                    fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
                   (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
                    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                      (Additive.to_Zero A)
                      (Additive.to_Zero A))
                   (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
                (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0))
       (AcyclicComplexFromObject_diff a (i - 1))) i0 =
Diff C i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : (i - 1 = i0) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0),
     A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end,
     match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
    (λ e : i - 1 = i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : (i - 1 = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0 + 1),
        A ⟦ a,
        match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ =>
            match
              isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
            with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : i - 1 = i0 + 1,
        fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
       (λ _ : i - 1 != i0 + 1,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1)
                 ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1),
           A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
          (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1, identity a)
          (λ n'' : i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1,
           fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
    (λ n : i - 1 != i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i0) ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0),
        A
        ⟦ match c with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
          end,
        match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ =>
            match
              isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
            with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : i - 1 + 1 = i0,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : (i - 1 = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0 + 1),
           A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ e'' : i - 1 = i0 + 1,
           fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
          (λ _ : i - 1 != i0 + 1,
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1),
              A ⟦ a,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end ⟧)
             (λ e''' : i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1,
              fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
             (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1,
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                (Additive.to_Zero A))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
       (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i0,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : (i - 1 = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0 + 1),
           A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ _ : i - 1 = i0 + 1,
           ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
             (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
          (λ _ : i - 1 != i0 + 1,
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1),
              A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end ⟧)
             (λ e''' : i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1,
              fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
             (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1,
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
    (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0) =
Diff C i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
coprod_rect
  (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
   A ⟦ C i0,
   match c with
   | inl _ => a
   | inr _ =>
       match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end
   end ⟧)
  (λ e : hzeq (i - 1) i0,
   transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧)
     (maponpaths C e)
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) · f)
  (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
            ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
      A ⟦ C i0,
      match c with
      | inl _ => a
      | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
      end ⟧)
     (λ e' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
        (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) f)
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
        (Additive.to_Zero A))
     (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
  (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0)
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : (i - 1 = i0) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0),
     A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end,
     match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
    (λ e : i - 1 = i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : (i - 1 = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0 + 1),
        A ⟦ a,
        match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ =>
            match
              isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
            with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : i - 1 = i0 + 1,
        fromempty (hzeqeisi e e'))
       (λ _ : i - 1 != i0 + 1,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1)
                 ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1),
           A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
          (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1, identity a)
          (λ n'' : i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1,
           fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n''))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
    (λ n : i - 1 != i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i0) ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0),
        A
        ⟦ match c with
          | inl _ => a
          | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
          end,
        match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ =>
            match
              isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
            with
            | inl _ => a
            | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
            end
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : i - 1 + 1 = i0,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : (i - 1 = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0 + 1),
           A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ e'' : i - 1 = i0 + 1,
           fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm e' e''))
          (λ _ : i - 1 != i0 + 1,
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1),
              A ⟦ a,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end ⟧)
             (λ e''' : i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1,
              fromempty (hzeqeisi e' e'''))
             (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1,
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                (Additive.to_Zero A))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
       (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i0,
        coprod_rect
          (λ c : (i - 1 = i0 + 1) ⨿ (i - 1 != i0 + 1),
           A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
          (λ _ : i - 1 = i0 + 1,
           ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
             (Additive.to_Zero A) a)
          (λ _ : i - 1 != i0 + 1,
           coprod_rect
             (λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1)
                    ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1),
              A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
              match c with
              | inl _ => a
              | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
              end ⟧)
             (λ e''' : i - 1 + 1 = i0 + 1,
              fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n e'''))
             (λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i0 + 1,
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A))
             (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
          (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
    (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0) =
Diff C i0
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
           ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
     A ⟦ C (i0 + 1),
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
    (λ e : hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
     transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧)
       (maponpaths C e)
       (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C (i - 1))) · f)
    (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1),
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
              ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
        A ⟦ C (i0 + 1),
        match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
        transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
          (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) f)
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1),
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
          (Additive.to_Zero A))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)))
    (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A ⟦ C i0,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧)
      (maponpaths C a0)
      (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
         (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
         (Diff C (i - 1))) · f
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
      return
        (A ⟦ C i0,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 =>
        transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
          (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) f
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
          (Additive.to_Zero A)
    end
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0 as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end,
       match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl _ => identity a
          | inr b0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr a0 b0)
          end
      end
  | inr b =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
        return
          (A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end,
           match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ a,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
              | inr _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
              end
          end
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl _ =>
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A) a
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a0 =>
                  fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' b a0)
              | inr _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
              end
          end
      end
  end =
Diff C i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ C (i0 + 1),
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧)
        (maponpaths C a0)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1))) · f
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ C (i0 + 1),
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
            (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) f
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
            (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  end
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A ⟦ C i0,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧)
      (maponpaths C a0)
      (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
         (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
         (Diff C (i - 1))) · f
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
      return
        (A ⟦ C i0,
         match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 =>
        transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
          (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) f
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
          (Additive.to_Zero A)
    end
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0 as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ =>
             match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end
         end,
       match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl _ => identity a
          | inr b0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr a0 b0)
          end
      end
  | inr b =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
        return
          (A
           ⟦ match c with
             | inl _ => a
             | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
             end,
           match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ a,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
              | inr _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
              end
          end
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ =>
                   match
                     isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
                   with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl _ =>
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A) a
          | inr _ =>
              match
                isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
                return
                  (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
                   match c with
                   | inl _ => a
                   | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
                   end ⟧)
              with
              | inl a0 =>
                  fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' b a0)
              | inr _ =>
                  ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (Additive.to_Zero A)
              end
          end
      end
  end =
Diff C i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ C (i0 + 1),
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧)
        (maponpaths C a0)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1))) · f
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return

       ⟦ match c with

         end,
       match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with

  with

                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
      | inr _ =>

            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return

               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
          | inr _ =>

  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with

               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A

      with

          match

               end ⟧)

          | inr _ =>
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A)
          end

  end =
Diff C i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return

       match c with

             isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)

  with

        (transportf

C: Complex A

f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq (i - 1) i0

     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) · f)

transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧) (maponpaths C e)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · f · identity a =
Diff C i0
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
    (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e'')) f
 exact (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors_comm_eq1 f i0 e e'').
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
e: hzeq (i - 1) i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
n'': ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧) (maponpaths C e)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1))) · f
· fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n'') =
Diff C i0
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
    (Additive.to_Zero A)
 exact (fromempty (hzeqnmplusr e n'')).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A ⟦ C i0,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
      (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) f
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
      (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end,
       match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqsnmnsm a0 a1)
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ a,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
          | inr _ =>
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
                (Additive.to_Zero A)
          end
      end
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ =>
               match
                 isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
               with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
            (Additive.to_Zero A) a
      | inr _ =>
          match
            isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
            return
              (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
               match c with
               | inl _ => a
               | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
               end ⟧)
          with
          | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n a0)
          | inr _ =>
              ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A)
                (Additive.to_Zero A)
          end
      end
  end =
Diff C i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ C (i0 + 1),
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match
             isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1)
           with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C i ⟧)
        (maponpaths C a0)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C (i - 1))) · f
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ C (i0 + 1),
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
            (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) f
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
            (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  end

        (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1))) · f)
 exact (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors_comm_eq2 f i0 e').
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
i0: hz
n: ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A ⟦ C i0,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
     end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
      (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) f
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i0)
      (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
    return
      (A
       ⟦ match c with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end,
       match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ a,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a1 => fromempty (hzeqeisi a0 a1)
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
            (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
        return
          (A ⟦ Additive.to_Zero A,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqnmplusr' n a0)
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
            (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  end =
Diff C i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ C (i0 + 1),
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
        (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) f
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
        (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

i: hz

i0: hz

n': ¬ hzeq (i - 1) (i0 + 1)
e''': hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e''')) f
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) (i0 + 1) as c
    return
      (A ⟦ a,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 => fromempty (hzeqeisi e''' a0)
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) a
        (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end =

· match

    return

       match c with

  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
        (maponpaths C (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) f
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i0 + 1))
        (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end

  (C i0) (Additive.to_Zero A)

  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) 
        (C (i0 + 1)) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
?Mors i0
· Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a (i - 1)) i0 =
Diff C i0 · ?Mors (i0 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C i0, AcyclicComplexFromObject a (i - 1) i0 ⟧
 exact (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
∏ i0 : hz,
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0
· Diff (AcyclicComplexFromObject a (i - 1)) i0 =
Diff C i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f (i0 + 1)
 exact (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors_comm f).
  Defined.


  (** Some equalities *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i0, i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject f i0 =
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i0, i: hz
f: A ⟦ a, C i ⟧
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject f i0 =
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i0, i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject f i0 =
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: A
C: Complex A
i0, i: hz
f: A ⟦ C i, a ⟧
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject f i0 =
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors f i0

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

End acyclic_complexes.



(** * The category of complexes *)
(** ** Introduction
   We construct the category of complexes where the objects are complexes, [Complex], and morphisms
   are  morphisms between complexes, [Morphism]. Also, we show that a monic (resp. epi) in this
   category is indexwise monic (resp. epi), [ComplexMonicIndexMonic] (resp. [ComplexEpiIndexEpi]).
   To show that a morphism of complexes is an isomorphism, it is enough to show that the morphism
   is indexwise isomorphism, [ComplexIsoIndexIso].
*)
Section complexes_precat.

  Variable A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure.

  (** ** Construction of the category of complexes *)

  Definition ComplexPreCat_ob_mor : precategory_ob_mor :=
    tpair (λ ob : UU, ob -> ob -> UU) (Complex A) (λ C1 C2 : Complex A, Morphism C1 C2).

  Definition ComplexPreCat_data : precategory_data :=
    make_precategory_data
      ComplexPreCat_ob_mor (λ (C : Complex A), IdMor C)
      (fun (C1 C2 C3 : Complex A) (M1 : Morphism C1 C2) (M2 : Morphism C2 C3) => MorphismComp M1 M2).

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_precategory ComplexPreCat_data

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_precategory ComplexPreCat_data

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
(∏ (a b : ComplexPreCat_data)
 (f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f)
× (∏ (a b : ComplexPreCat_data)
   (f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   f · identity b = f)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
(∏ (a b c d : ComplexPreCat_data)
 (f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 f · (g · h) = f · g · h)
× (∏ (a b c d : ComplexPreCat_data)
   (f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   f · g · h = f · (g · h))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
(∏ (a b : ComplexPreCat_data)
 (f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f)
× (∏ (a b : ComplexPreCat_data)
   (f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   f · identity b = f)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (a b : ComplexPreCat_data)
(f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f

∏ (a b : ComplexPreCat_data)
(f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · identity b = f

∏ (a b : ComplexPreCat_data)
(f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f

f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
identity a · f = f

a, b: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ i : hz, (identity a · f) i = f i

a, b: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
(identity a · f) i = f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
identity (a i) · f i = f i

        apply id_left.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (a b : ComplexPreCat_data)
(f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · identity b = f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f · identity b = f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ i : hz, (f · identity b) i = f i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
(f · identity b) i = f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: hz
f i · identity (b i) = f i

        apply id_right.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
(∏ (a b c d : ComplexPreCat_data)
 (f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 f · (g · h) = f · g · h)
× (∏ (a b c d : ComplexPreCat_data)
   (f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   f · g · h = f · (g · h))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (a b c d : ComplexPreCat_data)
(f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · (g · h) = f · g · h
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (a b c d : ComplexPreCat_data)
(f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · g · h = f · (g · h)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (a b c d : ComplexPreCat_data)
(f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · (g · h) = f · g · h
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b, c, d: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f · (g · h) = f · g · h

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b, c, d: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏ i : hz, (f · (g · h)) i = (f · g · h) i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b, c, d: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: hz
(f · (g · h)) i = (f · g · h) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b, c, d: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: hz
f i · (g i · h i) = f i · g i · h i

        apply assoc.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (a b c d : ComplexPreCat_data)
(f : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · g · h = f · (g · h)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b, c, d: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f · g · h = f · (g · h)

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b, c, d: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏ i : hz, (f · g · h) i = (f · (g · h)) i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b, c, d: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: hz
(f · g · h) i = (f · (g · h)) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a, b, c, d: ComplexPreCat_data
f: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: ComplexPreCat_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: hz
f i · g i · h i = f i · (g i · h i)

        apply assoc'.
  Qed.
  (* With Defined instead of Qed just above, we get a substantial increase in compile time:
        HomologicalAlgebra/KA                  (real: 334.56) >> (real:  57.64)
        HomologicalAlgebra/TranslationFunctors (real: 587.48) >> (real: 106.44)
        HomologicalAlgebra/MappingCylinder     (real:  31.59) >> (real:  13.79)
        HomologicalAlgebra/KAPreTriangulated   (real: 295.70) >> (real:  63.97)
        HomologicalAlgebra/KATriangulated      (real: 281.79) >> (real:  51.55)
        HomologicalAlgebra/CohomologyComplex   (real: 138.27) >> (real:  51.45)
   *)

  Definition ComplexPreCat : precategory := tpair _ _ is_precategory_ComplexPreCat_data.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
has_homsets ComplexPreCat

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
has_homsets ComplexPreCat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
isaset (ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
isaset (Morphism C1 C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
isaset (∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
∏ x : ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧,
isaset
  (∏ i : hz, x i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · x (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
isaset (∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
∏ t : hz, isaset (A ⟦ C1 t, C2 t ⟧)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
t: hz
isaset (A ⟦ C1 t, C2 t ⟧)
 apply to_has_homsets.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
∏ x : ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧,
isaset
  (∏ i : hz, x i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · x (i + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
x: ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
isaset
  (∏ i : hz, x i · Diff C2 i = Diff C1 i · x (i + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
x: ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
∏ t : hz,
isaset (x t · Diff C2 t = Diff C1 t · x (t + 1))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
x: ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
t: hz
isaset (x t · Diff C2 t = Diff C1 t · x (t + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat
x: ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C1 i, C2 i ⟧
t: hz
isaprop (x t · Diff C2 t = Diff C1 t · x (t + 1))
 apply to_has_homsets.
  Qed.

  Definition ComplexCat : category := make_category _ has_homsets_ComplexPreCat.

  (** ** Monic of complexes is indexwise monic *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A g i =
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i

C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i

FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i

i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i

M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject A g · M =
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject A h · M
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
MorphismComp (FromAcyclicComplexFromObject A g) M =
MorphismComp (FromAcyclicComplexFromObject A h) M

C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
∏ i0 : hz,
MorphismComp (FromAcyclicComplexFromObject A g) M i0 =
MorphismComp (FromAcyclicComplexFromObject A h) M i0

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A g i0 · M i0 =
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i0 · M i0

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
coprod_rect
  (λ c : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0,
   A
   ⟦ match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end, C1 i0 ⟧)
  (λ e : hzeq i i0,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
     (maponpaths C1 e) g)
  (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      A
      ⟦ match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
        end, C1 i0 ⟧)
     (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C1 e') (g · Diff C1 i))
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0))
     (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0)
· M i0 =
coprod_rect
  (λ c : hzeq i i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i0,
   A
   ⟦ match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end, C1 i0 ⟧)
  (λ e : hzeq i i0,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
     (maponpaths C1 e) h)
  (λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i0,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      A
      ⟦ match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
        end, C1 i0 ⟧)
     (λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
        (maponpaths C1 e') (h · Diff C1 i))
     (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0,
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
        (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0))
     (isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0)) (isdecrelhzeq i i0)
· M i0
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
match
  isdecrelhzeq i i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C1 a0) g
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
      return
        (A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end, C1 i0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 =>
        transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
          (maponpaths C1 a0) (g · Diff C1 i)
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0)
    end
end · M i0 =
match
  isdecrelhzeq i i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C1 a0) h
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
      return
        (A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end, C1 i0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 =>
        transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
          (maponpaths C1 a0) (h · Diff C1 i)
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0)
    end
end · M i0

       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with

      (maponpaths C1 a0) h
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c

        (A
         ⟦ match c with

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
match
  isdecrelhzeq i i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C1 a0) g
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
      return
        (A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end, C1 i0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 =>
        transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
          (maponpaths C1 a0) (g · Diff C1 i)
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0)
    end
end · M i0 =
match
  isdecrelhzeq i i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C1 a0) h
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
      return
        (A
         ⟦ match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end, C1 i0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl a0 =>
        transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
          (maponpaths C1 a0) (h · Diff C1 i)
    | inr _ =>
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0)

end · M i0

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
T: hzeq i i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 T)
  g · M i0 =
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 T)
  h · M i0
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq i i0
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C1 a0) (g · Diff C1 i)
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0)
end · M i0 =
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C1 a0) (h · Diff C1 i)
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0)
end · M i0

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
T: hzeq i i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 T)
  g · M i0 =
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 T)
  h · M i0
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C1 (idpath i)) g · M i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C1 (idpath i)) h · M i
 exact H.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq i i0
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C1 a0) (g · Diff C1 i)
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0)
end · M i0 =
match
  isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i0 as c
  return
    (A
     ⟦ match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end, C1 i0 ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
    transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
      (maponpaths C1 a0) (h · Diff C1 i)
| inr _ =>
    ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
      (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i0)
end · M i0
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq i i0
T': hzeq (i + 1) i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C1 T') (g · Diff C1 i) · M i0 =
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C1 T') (h · Diff C1 i) · M i0
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq i i0
F': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C1 i0) · M i0 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C1 i0) · M i0

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq i i0
T': hzeq (i + 1) i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C1 T') (g · Diff C1 i) · M i0 =
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C1 T') (h · Diff C1 i) · M i0
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
F: ¬ hzeq i (i + 1)
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C1 (idpath (i + 1))) (g · Diff C1 i)
· M (i + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms a)
  (maponpaths C1 (idpath (i + 1))) (h · Diff C1 i)
· M (i + 1)

g · Diff C1 i · M (i + 1) = h · Diff C1 i · M (i + 1)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq i i0
F': ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i0
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C1 i0) · M i0 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C1 i0) · M i0
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

i: hz
