A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
tmp:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic_eq M i g h H: FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A g i =
FromAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i
g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
tmp:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic_eq M i g h H: coprod_rect
(λ c : hzeq i i ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i,
A
⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end, C1 i ⟧)
(λ e : hzeq i i, transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 e) g)
(λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i,
coprod_rect
(λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i,
A ⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end, C1 i ⟧)
(λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i,
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 e') (g · Diff C1 i))
(λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i,
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i))
(isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i)) (isdecrelhzeq i i) =
coprod_rect
(λ c : hzeq i i ⨿ ¬ hzeq i i,
A
⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end, C1 i ⟧)
(λ e : hzeq i i, transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 e) h)
(λ _ : ¬ hzeq i i,
coprod_rect
(λ c : hzeq (i + 1) i ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i,
A ⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end, C1 i ⟧)
(λ e' : hzeq (i + 1) i,
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 e') (h · Diff C1 i))
(λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i + 1) i,
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i))
(isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i)) (isdecrelhzeq i i)
g = h
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
tmp:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic_eq M i g h H: coprod_rect
(λ c : (i = i) ⨿ (i != i),
A
⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end, C1 i ⟧)
(λ e : i = i, transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 e) g)
(λ _ : i != i,
coprod_rect
(λ c : (i + 1 = i) ⨿ (i + 1 != i),
A ⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end, C1 i ⟧)
(λ e' : i + 1 = i,
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 e') (g · Diff C1 i))
(λ _ : i + 1 != i,
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i))
(isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i)) (isdecrelhzeq i i) =
coprod_rect
(λ c : (i = i) ⨿ (i != i),
A
⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end, C1 i ⟧)
(λ e : i = i, transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 e) h)
(λ _ : i != i,
coprod_rect
(λ c : (i + 1 = i) ⨿ (i + 1 != i),
A ⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end, C1 i ⟧)
(λ e' : i + 1 = i,
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 e') (h · Diff C1 i))
(λ _ : i + 1 != i,
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i))
(isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i)) (isdecrelhzeq i i)
g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
tmp:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic_eq M i g h H: match
isdecrelhzeq i i as c
return
(A
⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end, C1 i ⟧)
with
| inl a0 => transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 a0) g
| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end, C1 i ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 a0)
(g · Diff C1 i)
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i)
end
end =
match
isdecrelhzeq i i as c
return
(A
⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end, C1 i ⟧)
with
| inl a0 => transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 a0) h
| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end, C1 i ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 a0)
(h · Diff C1 i)
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i)
end
end
g = h

i: hz
a: A

H: g · M i = h · M i
tmp:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic_eq M i g h H: match
isdecrelhzeq i i as c
return
(A
⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end, C1 i ⟧)
with

| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end, C1 i ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 a0)
(g · Diff C1 i)
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i)

match
isdecrelhzeq i i as c
return
(A
⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>

| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end, C1 i ⟧)
with
| inl a0 => transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 a0) h
| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end, C1 i ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 a0)
(h · Diff C1 i)
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i)

g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
M: Monic ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ a, C1 i ⟧
H: g · M i = h · M i
tmp: transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 (idpath i)) g =
transportf (precategory_morphisms a) (maponpaths C1 (idpath i)) h
g = h

    exact tmp.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
isMonic (f : ComplexCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
isMonic (f : ComplexCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
∏ (x : ComplexCat) (g h : ComplexCat ⟦ x, C1 ⟧),
g · f = h · f → g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
x: ComplexCat
g, h: ComplexCat ⟦ x, C1 ⟧
X: g · f = h · f
g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
x: ComplexCat
g, h: ComplexCat ⟦ x, C1 ⟧
X: g · f = h · f
∏ i : hz, g i = h i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
x: ComplexCat
g, h: ComplexCat ⟦ x, C1 ⟧
X: g · f = h · f
i: hz
g i = h i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
x: ComplexCat
g, h: ComplexCat ⟦ x, C1 ⟧
X: g · f = h · f
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' A (g · f) (h · f) X i: (g · f) i = (h · f) i
g i = h i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
x: ComplexCat
g, h: ComplexCat ⟦ x, C1 ⟧
X: g · f = h · f
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' A (MorphismComp g f)
  (MorphismComp h f) X i: g i · f i = h i · f i
g i = h i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (f i)
x: ComplexCat
g, h: ComplexCat ⟦ x, C1 ⟧
X: g · f = h · f
i: hz
tmp: g i = h i
g i = h i

    exact tmp.
  Qed.

  (** ** Epi of complexes is indexwise epi *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A g i =
ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i

C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz

g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧

ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i

ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i

i: hz

E · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject A h
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
MorphismComp E (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject A g) =
MorphismComp E (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject A h)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
∏ i0 : hz,
MorphismComp E (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject A g) i0 =
MorphismComp E (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject A h) i0

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz

MorphismComp E (ToAcyclicComplexFromObject A h) i0
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
E i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A g i0 =
E i0 · ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i0

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
E i0
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
     A ⟦ C2 i0,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
    (λ e : hzeq (i - 1) i0,
     transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧)
       (maponpaths C2 e)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · g)
    (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
              ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
        A ⟦ C2 i0,
        match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
        transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
          (maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) g)
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
          (Additive.to_Zero A))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
    (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0) =
E i0
· coprod_rect
    (λ c : hzeq (i - 1) i0 ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
     A ⟦ C2 i0,
     match c with
     | inl _ => a
     | inr _ =>
         match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
         | inl _ => a
         | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
         end
     end ⟧)
    (λ e : hzeq (i - 1) i0,
     transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧)
       (maponpaths C2 e)
       (transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · h)
    (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0,
     coprod_rect
       (λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
              ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
        A ⟦ C2 i0,
        match c with
        | inl _ => a
        | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
        end ⟧)
       (λ e' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
        transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
          (maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) h)
       (λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0,
        ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
          (Additive.to_Zero A))
       (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0))
    (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
E i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0 as c
    return
      (A ⟦ C2 i0,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧)
        (maponpaths C2 a0)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · g
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
        return
          (A ⟦ C2 i0,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
            (maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0))
            g
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
            (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  end =
E i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i0 as c
    return
      (A ⟦ C2 i0,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ =>
           match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧)
        (maponpaths C2 a0)
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
           (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · h
  | inr _ =>
      match
        isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
        return
          (A ⟦ C2 i0,
           match c with
           | inl _ => a
           | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
           end ⟧)
      with
      | inl a0 =>
          transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
            (maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0))
            h
      | inr _ =>
          ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
            (Additive.to_Zero A)
      end
  end

C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
T: hzeq (i - 1) i0
E i0
· (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧)
     (maponpaths C2 T)
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · g) =
E i0
· (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧)
     (maponpaths C2 T)
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · h)

       match c with
       | inl _ => a

      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)

  | inr _ =>

  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
        (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end

H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
T: hzeq (i - 1) i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i0))
  (maponpaths C2 (! T)) (E i0) · Diff C2 (i - 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i0))
  (maponpaths C2 (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1))
  (E i0 · Diff C2 i0)

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
T: hzeq (i - 1) i0
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i0))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (! idpath (i - 1))) (E (i - 1))
· Diff C2 (i - 1) =
E (i - 1)
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2
       (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! idpath (i - 1)) 1))
    (Diff C2 (i - 1))
 apply idpath.

i: hz
a: A

  (maponpaths C1
     (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1))

     (maponpaths C2

         hzrminusplus i 1)) (E (i0 + 1)) · g) =

     (maponpaths C2

C1, C2: Complex A

i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧

i0: hz
T: hzeq (i - 1) i0
tmp''':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A C1
  C2 E (i0 + 1) i
  (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1 @
   hzrminusplus i 1): E i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths C2
     (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1 @
      hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1
        (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1 @
         hzrminusplus i 1)) 
     (E (i0 + 1)))

  (maponpaths C2
     (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1
        (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1 @
         hzrminusplus i 1)) (E (i0 + 1))) · g =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths C2
     (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1
        (maponpaths_2 hzplus (! T) 1 @
         hzrminusplus i 1)) (E (i0 + 1))) · h

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0
E i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
    return
      (A ⟦ C2 i0,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
        (maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) g
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
        (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end =
E i0
· match
    isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0 as c
    return
      (A ⟦ C2 i0,
       match c with
       | inl _ => a
       | inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
       end ⟧)
  with
  | inl a0 =>
      transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
        (maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) h
  | inr _ =>
      ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
        (Additive.to_Zero A)
  end
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0
e': hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
E i0
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
    (maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) g =
E i0
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
    (maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) h
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
i0: hz
F: ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i0
n': ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i0
E i0
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
    (Additive.to_Zero A) =
E i0
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i0)
    (Additive.to_Zero A)

  C2 E i0 i (! e' @ hzrminusplus i 1): E i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths C2 (! e' @ hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 i0 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (! e' @ hzrminusplus i 1))
     (E i0))

  (maponpaths C2 (! e' @ hzrminusplus i 1))

  (transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C2 i0 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (! e' @ hzrminusplus i 1)) (E i0))
· h

C1, C2: Complex A

a: A

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
tmp:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi_eq E i g h H: ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A g i = ToAcyclicComplexFromObject_mors A h i

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
tmp:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi_eq E i g h H: coprod_rect
(λ c : hzeq (i - 1) i ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i,
A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end ⟧)
(λ e : hzeq (i - 1) i,
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 e)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · g)
(λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i,
coprod_rect
(λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i,
A ⟦ C2 i, match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
(λ e' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i,
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) g)
(λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i,
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A))
(isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i)) (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i) =
coprod_rect
(λ c : hzeq (i - 1) i ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i,
A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end ⟧)
(λ e : hzeq (i - 1) i,
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 e)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · h)
(λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1) i,
coprod_rect
(λ c : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i ⨿ ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i,
A ⟦ C2 i, match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
(λ e' : hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i,
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) h)
(λ _ : ¬ hzeq (i - 1 + 1) i,
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A))
(isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i)) (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i)
g = h
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
tmp:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi_eq E i g h H: coprod_rect
(λ c : (i - 1 = i) ⨿ (i - 1 != i),
A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end ⟧)
(λ e : i - 1 = i,
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 e)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · g)
(λ _ : i - 1 != i,
coprod_rect
(λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i) ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i),
A ⟦ C2 i, match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
(λ e' : i - 1 + 1 = i,
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) g)
(λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i,
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A))
(isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i)) (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i) =
coprod_rect
(λ c : (i - 1 = i) ⨿ (i - 1 != i),
A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end ⟧)
(λ e : i - 1 = i,
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 e)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · h)
(λ _ : i - 1 != i,
coprod_rect
(λ c : (i - 1 + 1 = i) ⨿ (i - 1 + 1 != i),
A ⟦ C2 i, match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
(λ e' : i - 1 + 1 = i,
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ e')) h)
(λ _ : i - 1 + 1 != i,
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A))
(isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i)) (isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i)
g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
tmp:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi_eq E i g h H: match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 a0)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · g
| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) g
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
end =
match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 a0)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · h
| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) h
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
end
g = h

| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 a0)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · h
| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) h
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
end
g = h
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
tmp:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi_eq E i g h H: match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 a0)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · g
| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) g
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
end =
match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ =>
match isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 i ⟧) (maponpaths C2 a0)
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1))) · h
| inr _ =>
match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i,
match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) h
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
end
g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
tmp: match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i, match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) g
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end =
match
isdecrelhzeq (i - 1 + 1) i as c
return
(A ⟦ C2 i, match c with
| inl _ => a
| inr _ => Additive.to_Zero A
end ⟧)
with
| inl a0 =>
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ a0)) h
| inr _ => ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (Additive.to_Zero A)
end
g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
tmp: transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1)) g =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1)) h
g = h

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
E: Epi ComplexCat C1 C2
i: hz
a: A
g, h: A ⟦ C2 i, a ⟧
H: E i · g = E i · h
tmp: transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧) (maponpaths C2 (idpath i)) g =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a ⟧) (maponpaths C2 (idpath i)) h
g = h

    exact tmp.
  Qed.

f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (f i)
∏ (z : ComplexPreCat) (g h : ComplexPreCat ⟦ C2, z ⟧),
f · g = f · h → g = h

f: Morphism C1 C2

z: ComplexPreCat
g, h: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C2, z ⟧
X: f · g = f · h
g = h

f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (f i)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (f i)
z: ComplexPreCat
g, h: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C2, z ⟧
X: f · g = f · h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' A (f · g) (f · h) X i: (f · g) i = (f · h) i
g i = h i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (f i)
z: ComplexPreCat
g, h: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C2, z ⟧
X: f · g = f · h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' A (MorphismComp f g)
  (MorphismComp f h) X i: f i · g i = f i · h i
g i = h i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
H: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (f i)
z: ComplexPreCat
g, h: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C2, z ⟧
X: f · g = f · h
i: hz
tmp: g i = h i
g i = h i

    exact tmp.
  Qed.

  (** ** An morphism in complexes is an isomorphism if it is so indexwise *)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
i: hz

e1: inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1)) · f (i + 1) =
identity (C2 (i + 1))
Diff C2 i = Diff C2 i
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (make_Morphism A C2 C1
     (λ i : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i) (H i))
     (λ i : hz,
      post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1)) (f (i + 1)) (H (i + 1)) (C2 i)
        (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
        (Diff C2 i
         · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1)))
        (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i) (C2 i)
           (C2 (i + 1)) (f i) (H i)
           (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
            · f (i + 1))
           (Diff C2 i
            · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
            · f (i + 1))
           (let e0 :=
              iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso (f i) (H i))
              in
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
              (f i
               · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
                  · f (i + 1)))
              (f i
               · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
               · f (i + 1))
              (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
               p =
               f i
               · (Diff C2 i
                  · inv_from_iso
                      (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                  · f (i + 1)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (f i
                  · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                     · Diff C1 i))
                 (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                  · Diff C1 i)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                  p · f (i + 1) =
                  f i
                  · (Diff C2 i
                     · inv_from_iso
                         (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                     · f (i + 1)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧)
                    (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                    (identity (C1 i))
                    (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧,
                     p · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1) =
                     f i
                     · (Diff C2 i
                        · inv_from_iso (f ...,, H ...)
                        · f (i + 1)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                       (identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i)
                       (Diff C1 i)
                       (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                        p · f (i + 1) =
                        f i
                        · (Diff C2 i
                           · inv_from_iso (...)
                           · f (i + 1)))
                       (internal_paths_rew
                          (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
                          (f i · Diff C2 i)
                          (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1)
                                 ⟧,
                           p =
                           f i · (... · ... · f ...))
                          (cancel_precomposition A
                             (C1 i) (C2 i)
                             (C2 (i + 1)) (Diff C2 i)
                             (Diff C2 i
                              · inv_from_iso (...)
                              · f (i + 1)) (f i)
                             (let e1 :=
                                iso_after_iso_inv
                                  (...) in
                              internal_paths_rew
                                (A ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                                (... · ...)
                                (λ ..., ...)
                                (internal_paths_rew_r
                                   ... ... ... ... ...
                                   e1) (... · ...)
                                (assoc ... ... ...)))
                          (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
                          (MComm f i))
                       (id_left (Diff C1 i))) e0)
                 (assoc (f i)
                    (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                    (Diff C1 i)))
              (assoc (f i)
                 (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
                 (f (i + 1)))))
      :
      (λ i0 : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i0) (H i0)) i
      · Diff C1 i =
      Diff C2 i
      · (λ i0 : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i0) (H i0))
          (i + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
f
· make_Morphism A C2 C1
    (λ i : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i) (H i))
    (λ i : hz,
     post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i + 1))
       (C2 (i + 1)) (f (i + 1)) (H (i + 1)) (C2 i)
       (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
       (Diff C2 i
        · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1)))
       (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i) (C2 i)
          (C2 (i + 1)) (f i) (H i)
          (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
           · f (i + 1))
          (Diff C2 i
           · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
           · f (i + 1))
          (let e0 :=
             iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso (f i) (H i))
             in
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
             (f i
              · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
                 · f (i + 1)))
             (f i
              · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
              · f (i + 1))
             (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
              p =
              f i
              · (Diff C2 i
                 · inv_from_iso
                     (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                 · f (i + 1)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                (f i
                 · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                    · Diff C1 i))
                (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                 · Diff C1 i)
                (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                 p · f (i + 1) =
                 f i
                 · (Diff C2 i
                    · inv_from_iso
                        (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                    · f (i + 1)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧)
                   (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                   (identity (C1 i))
                   (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧,
                    p · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1) =
                    f i
                    · (Diff C2 i
                       · inv_from_iso
                           (f (...),, H (...))
                       · f (i + 1)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                      (identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i)
                      (Diff C1 i)
                      (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                       p · f (i + 1) =
                       f i
                       · (Diff C2 i
                          · inv_from_iso (...,, ...)
                          · f (i + 1)))
                      (internal_paths_rew
                         (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
                         (f i · Diff C2 i)
                         (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
                          p =
                          f i
                          · (Diff C2 i
                             · inv_from_iso ...
                             · f (...)))
                         (cancel_precomposition A
                            (C1 i) (C2 i) (C2 (i + 1))
                            (Diff C2 i)
                            (Diff C2 i
                             · inv_from_iso
                                 (...,, ...)
                             · f (i + 1)) (f i)
                            (let e1 :=
                               iso_after_iso_inv
                                 (make_iso ... ...) in
                             internal_paths_rew
                               (A ⟦ C2 i, C2 ... ⟧)
                               (Diff C2 i · (...))
                               (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                               (internal_paths_rew_r
                                  (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...) (...) e1)
                               (... · ... · f ...)
                               (assoc (...) (...)
                                  (...))))
                         (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
                         (MComm f i))
                      (id_left (Diff C1 i))) e0)
                (assoc (f i)
                   (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                   (Diff C1 i)))
             (assoc (f i)
                (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
                (f (i + 1)))))) = identity C1
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
make_Morphism A C2 C1
  (λ i : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i) (H i))
  (λ i : hz,
   post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
     (f (i + 1)) (H (i + 1)) (C2 i)
     (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
     (Diff C2 i · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1)))
     (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i) (C2 i)
        (C2 (i + 1)) (f i) (H i)
        (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
         · f (i + 1))
        (Diff C2 i
         · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
         · f (i + 1))
        (let e0 :=
           iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso (f i) (H i)) in
         internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
           (f i
            · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
               · f (i + 1)))
           (f i
            · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
            · f (i + 1))
           (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
            p =
            f i
            · (Diff C2 i
               · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
               · f (i + 1)))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
              (f i
               · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i))
              (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
               · Diff C1 i)
              (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
               p · f (i + 1) =
               f i
               · (Diff C2 i
                  · inv_from_iso
                      (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                  · f (i + 1)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧)
                 (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                 (identity (C1 i))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧,
                  p · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1) =
                  f i
                  · (Diff C2 i
                     · inv_from_iso
                         (f (...),, H (...))
                     · f (i + 1)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                    (identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i)
                    (Diff C1 i)
                    (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                     p · f (i + 1) =
                     f i
                     · (Diff C2 i
                        · inv_from_iso (...,, ...)
                        · f (i + 1)))
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
                       (f i · Diff C2 i)
                       (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
                        p =
                        f i
                        · (Diff C2 i
                           · inv_from_iso ...
                           · f (...)))
                       (cancel_precomposition A (C1 i)
                          (C2 i) (C2 (i + 1))
                          (Diff C2 i)
                          (Diff C2 i
                           · inv_from_iso (...,, ...)
                           · f (i + 1)) (f i)
                          (let e1 :=
                             iso_after_iso_inv
                               (make_iso ... ...) in
                           internal_paths_rew
                             (A ⟦ C2 i, C2 ... ⟧)
                             (Diff C2 i · (...))
                             (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) e1)
                             (... · ... · f ...)
                             (assoc (...) (...) (...))))
                       (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
                       (MComm f i))
                    (id_left (Diff C1 i))) e0)
              (assoc (f i) (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                 (Diff C1 i)))
           (assoc (f i)
              (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
              (f (i + 1)))))) · f = identity C2

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
f
· make_Morphism A C2 C1
    (λ i : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i) (H i))
    (λ i : hz,
     post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i + 1))
       (C2 (i + 1)) (f (i + 1)) (H (i + 1)) (C2 i)
       (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
       (Diff C2 i
        · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1)))
       (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i) (C2 i)
          (C2 (i + 1)) (f i) (H i)
          (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
           · f (i + 1))
          (Diff C2 i
           · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
           · f (i + 1))
          (let e0 :=
             iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso (f i) (H i))
             in
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
             (f i
              · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
                 · f (i + 1)))
             (f i
              · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
              · f (i + 1))
             (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
              p =
              f i
              · (Diff C2 i
                 · inv_from_iso
                     (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                 · f (i + 1)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                (f i
                 · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                    · Diff C1 i))
                (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                 · Diff C1 i)
                (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                 p · f (i + 1) =
                 f i
                 · (Diff C2 i
                    · inv_from_iso
                        (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                    · f (i + 1)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧)
                   (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                   (identity (C1 i))
                   (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧,
                    p · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1) =
                    f i
                    · (Diff C2 i
                       · inv_from_iso
                           (f (...),, H (...))
                       · f (i + 1)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                      (identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i)
                      (Diff C1 i)
                      (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                       p · f (i + 1) =
                       f i
                       · (Diff C2 i
                          · inv_from_iso (...,, ...)
                          · f (i + 1)))
                      (internal_paths_rew
                         (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
                         (f i · Diff C2 i)
                         (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
                          p =
                          f i
                          · (Diff C2 i
                             · inv_from_iso ...
                             · f (...)))
                         (cancel_precomposition A
                            (C1 i) (C2 i) (C2 (i + 1))
                            (Diff C2 i)
                            (Diff C2 i
                             · inv_from_iso
                                 (...,, ...)
                             · f (i + 1)) (f i)
                            (let e1 :=
                               iso_after_iso_inv
                                 (make_iso ... ...) in
                             internal_paths_rew
                               (A ⟦ C2 i, C2 ... ⟧)
                               (Diff C2 i · (...))
                               (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                               (internal_paths_rew_r
                                  (...) (...) (...)
                                  (...) (...) e1)
                               (... · ... · f ...)
                               (assoc (...) (...)
                                  (...))))
                         (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
                         (MComm f i))
                      (id_left (Diff C1 i))) e0)
                (assoc (f i)
                   (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                   (Diff C1 i)))
             (assoc (f i)
                (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
                (f (i + 1)))))) = identity C1
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
∏ i : hz,
(f
 · make_Morphism A C2 C1
     (λ i0 : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i0) (H i0))
     (λ i0 : hz,
      post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i0 + 1))
        (C2 (i0 + 1)) (f (i0 + 1)) (H (i0 + 1))
        (C2 i0)
        (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0) · Diff C1 i0)
        (Diff C2 i0
         · inv_from_iso (f (i0 + 1),, H (i0 + 1)))
        (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i0) (C2 i0)
           (C2 (i0 + 1)) (f i0) (H i0)
           (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0) · Diff C1 i0
            · f (i0 + 1))
           (Diff C2 i0
            · inv_from_iso (f (i0 + 1),, H (i0 + 1))
            · f (i0 + 1))
           (let e0 :=
              iso_inv_after_iso
                (make_iso (f i0) (H i0)) in
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ C1 i0, C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
              (f i0
               · (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                  · Diff C1 i0 · f (i0 + 1)))
              (f i0
               · (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                  · Diff C1 i0) · f (i0 + 1))
              (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧,
               p =
               f i0
               · (Diff C2 i0
                  · inv_from_iso
                      (f (i0 + 1),, H (i0 + 1))
                  · f (i0 + 1)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
                 (f i0
                  · (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                     · Diff C1 i0))
                 (f i0 · inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                  · Diff C1 i0)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 (i0 + 1) ⟧,
                  p · f (i0 + 1) =
                  f i0
                  · (Diff C2 i0
                     · inv_from_iso (f ...,, H ...)
                     · f (i0 + 1)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 i0 ⟧)
                    (f i0 · inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0))
                    (identity (C1 i0))
                    (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 i0 ⟧,
                     p · Diff C1 i0 · f (i0 + 1) =
                     f i0
                     · (Diff C2 i0
                        · inv_from_iso (...)
                        · f (i0 + 1)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
                       (identity (C1 i0) · Diff C1 i0)
                       (Diff C1 i0)
                       (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 (i0 + 1) ⟧,
                        p · f (i0 + 1) =
                        f i0 · (... · ... · f ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew
                          (A ⟦ C1 i0, C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
                          (f i0 · Diff C2 i0)
                          (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C2 ... ⟧,
                           p = f i0 · (...))
                          (cancel_precomposition A
                             (C1 i0) (C2 i0)
                             (C2 (...)) (Diff C2 i0)
                             (... · ... · f ...)
                             (f i0)
                             (let e1 := ... in
                              internal_paths_rew ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...))
                          (Diff C1 i0 · f (i0 + 1))
                          (MComm f i0))
                       (id_left (Diff C1 i0))) e0)
                 (assoc (f i0)
                    (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0))
                    (Diff C1 i0)))
              (assoc (f i0)
                 (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                  · Diff C1 i0) (f (i0 + 1))))))) i =
identity C1 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
i: hz
(f
 · make_Morphism A C2 C1
     (λ i : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i) (H i))
     (λ i : hz,
      post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1)) (f (i + 1)) (H (i + 1)) (C2 i)
        (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
        (Diff C2 i
         · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1)))
        (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i) (C2 i)
           (C2 (i + 1)) (f i) (H i)
           (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
            · f (i + 1))
           (Diff C2 i
            · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
            · f (i + 1))
           (let e0 :=
              iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso (f i) (H i))
              in
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
              (f i
               · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
                  · f (i + 1)))
              (f i
               · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
               · f (i + 1))
              (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
               p =
               f i
               · (Diff C2 i
                  · inv_from_iso
                      (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                  · f (i + 1)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                 (f i
                  · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                     · Diff C1 i))
                 (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                  · Diff C1 i)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                  p · f (i + 1) =
                  f i
                  · (Diff C2 i
                     · inv_from_iso
                         (f (...),, H (...))
                     · f (i + 1)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧)
                    (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                    (identity (C1 i))
                    (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧,
                     p · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1) =
                     f i
                     · (Diff C2 i
                        · inv_from_iso (...,, ...)
                        · f (i + 1)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                       (identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i)
                       (Diff C1 i)
                       (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                        p · f (i + 1) =
                        f i
                        · (Diff C2 i
                           · inv_from_iso ...
                           · f (...)))
                       (internal_paths_rew
                          (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
                          (f i · Diff C2 i)
                          (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (...) ⟧,
                           p = f i · (... · ...))
                          (cancel_precomposition A
                             (C1 i) (C2 i)
                             (C2 (i + 1)) (Diff C2 i)
                             (Diff C2 i
                              · inv_from_iso ...
                              · f (...)) (f i)
                             (let e1 :=
                                iso_after_iso_inv ...
                                in
                              internal_paths_rew (...)
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...)))
                          (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
                          (MComm f i))
                       (id_left (Diff C1 i))) e0)
                 (assoc (f i)
                    (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                    (Diff C1 i)))
              (assoc (f i)
                 (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
                 (f (i + 1))))))) i = identity C1 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
i: hz
f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) = identity (C1 i)
 apply (iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso _ (H i))).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
make_Morphism A C2 C1
  (λ i : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i) (H i))
  (λ i : hz,
   post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
     (f (i + 1)) (H (i + 1)) (C2 i)
     (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
     (Diff C2 i · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1)))
     (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i) (C2 i)
        (C2 (i + 1)) (f i) (H i)
        (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
         · f (i + 1))
        (Diff C2 i
         · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
         · f (i + 1))
        (let e0 :=
           iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso (f i) (H i)) in
         internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
           (f i
            · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
               · f (i + 1)))
           (f i
            · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
            · f (i + 1))
           (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
            p =
            f i
            · (Diff C2 i
               · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
               · f (i + 1)))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
              (f i
               · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i))
              (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
               · Diff C1 i)
              (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
               p · f (i + 1) =
               f i
               · (Diff C2 i
                  · inv_from_iso
                      (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                  · f (i + 1)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧)
                 (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                 (identity (C1 i))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧,
                  p · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1) =
                  f i
                  · (Diff C2 i
                     · inv_from_iso
                         (f (...),, H (...))
                     · f (i + 1)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                    (identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i)
                    (Diff C1 i)
                    (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                     p · f (i + 1) =
                     f i
                     · (Diff C2 i
                        · inv_from_iso (...,, ...)
                        · f (i + 1)))
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
                       (f i · Diff C2 i)
                       (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
                        p =
                        f i
                        · (Diff C2 i
                           · inv_from_iso ...
                           · f (...)))
                       (cancel_precomposition A (C1 i)
                          (C2 i) (C2 (i + 1))
                          (Diff C2 i)
                          (Diff C2 i
                           · inv_from_iso (...,, ...)
                           · f (i + 1)) (f i)
                          (let e1 :=
                             iso_after_iso_inv
                               (make_iso ... ...) in
                           internal_paths_rew
                             (A ⟦ C2 i, C2 ... ⟧)
                             (Diff C2 i · (...))
                             (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) e1)
                             (... · ... · f ...)
                             (assoc (...) (...) (...))))
                       (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
                       (MComm f i))
                    (id_left (Diff C1 i))) e0)
              (assoc (f i) (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                 (Diff C1 i)))
           (assoc (f i)
              (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
              (f (i + 1)))))) · f = identity C2
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
∏ i : hz,
(make_Morphism A C2 C1
   (λ i0 : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i0) (H i0))
   (λ i0 : hz,
    post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i0 + 1))
      (C2 (i0 + 1)) (f (i0 + 1)) (H (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)
      (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0) · Diff C1 i0)
      (Diff C2 i0
       · inv_from_iso (f (i0 + 1),, H (i0 + 1)))
      (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i0) (C2 i0)
         (C2 (i0 + 1)) (f i0) (H i0)
         (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0) · Diff C1 i0
          · f (i0 + 1))
         (Diff C2 i0
          · inv_from_iso (f (i0 + 1),, H (i0 + 1))
          · f (i0 + 1))
         (let e0 :=
            iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso (f i0) (H i0))
            in
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (A ⟦ C1 i0, C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
            (f i0
             · (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                · Diff C1 i0 · f (i0 + 1)))
            (f i0
             · (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                · Diff C1 i0) · f (i0 + 1))
            (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧,
             p =
             f i0
             · (Diff C2 i0
                · inv_from_iso
                    (f (i0 + 1),, H (i0 + 1))
                · f (i0 + 1)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
               (f i0
                · (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                   · Diff C1 i0))
               (f i0 · inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                · Diff C1 i0)
               (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 (i0 + 1) ⟧,
                p · f (i0 + 1) =
                f i0
                · (Diff C2 i0
                   · inv_from_iso (f ...,, H ...)
                   · f (i0 + 1)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 i0 ⟧)
                  (f i0 · inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0))
                  (identity (C1 i0))
                  (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 i0 ⟧,
                   p · Diff C1 i0 · f (i0 + 1) =
                   f i0
                   · (Diff C2 i0 · inv_from_iso (...)
                      · f (i0 + 1)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
                     (identity (C1 i0) · Diff C1 i0)
                     (Diff C1 i0)
                     (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C1 (i0 + 1) ⟧,
                      p · f (i0 + 1) =
                      f i0 · (... · ... · f ...))
                     (internal_paths_rew
                        (A ⟦ C1 i0, C2 (i0 + 1) ⟧)
                        (f i0 · Diff C2 i0)
                        (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i0, C2 ... ⟧,
                         p = f i0 · (...))
                        (cancel_precomposition A
                           (C1 i0) (C2 i0) (C2 (...))
                           (Diff C2 i0)
                           (... · ... · f ...) (f i0)
                           (let e1 := ... in
                            internal_paths_rew ... ...
                              ... ... ... ...))
                        (Diff C1 i0 · f (i0 + 1))
                        (MComm f i0))
                     (id_left (Diff C1 i0))) e0)
               (assoc (f i0)
                  (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0))
                  (Diff C1 i0)))
            (assoc (f i0)
               (inv_from_iso (f i0,, H i0)
                · Diff C1 i0) (f (i0 + 1)))))) · f) i =
identity C2 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
i: hz
(make_Morphism A C2 C1
   (λ i : hz, iso_inv_from_is_iso (f i) (H i))
   (λ i : hz,
    post_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 (i + 1))
      (C2 (i + 1)) (f (i + 1)) (H (i + 1)) (C2 i)
      (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
      (Diff C2 i
       · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1)))
      (pre_comp_with_iso_is_inj (C1 i) (C2 i)
         (C2 (i + 1)) (f i) (H i)
         (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
          · f (i + 1))
         (Diff C2 i
          · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
          · f (i + 1))
         (let e0 :=
            iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso (f i) (H i))
            in
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
            (f i
             · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i
                · f (i + 1)))
            (f i
             · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
             · f (i + 1))
            (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧,
             p =
             f i
             · (Diff C2 i
                · inv_from_iso (f (i + 1),, H (i + 1))
                · f (i + 1)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
               (f i
                · (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                   · Diff C1 i))
               (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i)
                · Diff C1 i)
               (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                p · f (i + 1) =
                f i
                · (Diff C2 i
                   · inv_from_iso (f (...),, H (...))
                   · f (i + 1)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧)
                  (f i · inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                  (identity (C1 i))
                  (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 i ⟧,
                   p · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1) =
                   f i
                   · (Diff C2 i
                      · inv_from_iso (...,, ...)
                      · f (i + 1)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧)
                     (identity (C1 i) · Diff C1 i)
                     (Diff C1 i)
                     (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧,
                      p · f (i + 1) =
                      f i
                      · (Diff C2 i · inv_from_iso ...
                         · f (...)))
                     (internal_paths_rew
                        (A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
                        (f i · Diff C2 i)
                        (λ p : A ⟦ C1 i, C2 (...) ⟧,
                         p = f i · (... · ...))
                        (cancel_precomposition A
                           (C1 i) (C2 i) (C2 (i + 1))
                           (Diff C2 i)
                           (Diff C2 i
                            · inv_from_iso ...
                            · f (...)) (f i)
                           (let e1 :=
                              iso_after_iso_inv ... in
                            internal_paths_rew (...)
                              (...) (...) (...) (...)
                              (...)))
                        (Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
                        (MComm f i))
                     (id_left (Diff C1 i))) e0)
               (assoc (f i) (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i))
                  (Diff C1 i)))
            (assoc (f i)
               (inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · Diff C1 i)
               (f (i + 1)))))) · f) i = identity C2 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: ∏ i : hz, is_iso (f i)
i: hz
inv_from_iso (f i,, H i) · f i = identity (C2 i)
 apply (iso_after_iso_inv (make_iso _ (H i))).
  Qed.

End complexes_precat.


(** * The category of complexes over CategoryWithAdditiveStructure is CategoryWithAdditiveStructure *)
(** ** Introduction
   We give the category of complexes over an additive category a natural structure as an additive
   category. Addition of morphisms is given by indexwise addition, [MorphismOp], [ZeroComplex] is a
   zero object, which is shown to be zero in [ComplexPreCat_isZero], and binary direct sums are
   given by [DirectSumComplex]. [ComplexPreCat_Additive] is the main result.
*)
Section complexes_additive.

  Variable A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
precategoryWithBinOps

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
precategoryWithBinOps

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
category
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
precategoryWithBinOpsData ?C

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
category
 exact (ComplexCat A).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
precategoryWithBinOpsData (ComplexCat A)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexCat A
binop (ComplexCat A ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 exact (MorphismOp A).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
categoryWithAbgrops

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
categoryWithAbgrops

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
precategoryWithBinOps
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
categoryWithAbgropsData ?PB

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
precategoryWithBinOps
 exact ComplexPreCat_precategoryWithBinOps.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
categoryWithAbgropsData
  ComplexPreCat_precategoryWithBinOps
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_precategoryWithBinOps
isabgrop (to_binop x y)
 exact (MorphismOp_isabgrop A x y).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isPreAdditive ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isPreAdditive ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (x y z : ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops)
(f : ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (x y z : ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops)
(f : ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (x y z : ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops)
(f : ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
isbinopfun (to_premor z f)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_premor z f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
isbinopfun (to_premor z f)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: (y --> z)%abgrcat
to_premor z f (g + h)%addmonoid =
(to_premor z f g + to_premor z f h)%addmonoid

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: (y --> z)%abgrcat
∏ i : hz,
to_premor z f (g + h)%addmonoid i =
(to_premor z f g + to_premor z f h)%addmonoid i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: (y --> z)%abgrcat
i: hz
to_premor z f (g + h)%addmonoid i =
(to_premor z f g + to_premor z f h)%addmonoid i

        apply to_premor_linear'.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_premor z f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ i : hz, to_premor z f 0%abgrcat i = 0%abgrcat i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
to_premor z f 0%abgrcat i = 0%abgrcat i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
f i · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (y i) (z i) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (x i) (z i)

        apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (x y z : ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops)
(f : ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)

g, h: (x --> y)%abgrcat
i: hz
to_postmor x f (g + h)%addmonoid i =
(to_postmor x f g + to_postmor x f h)%addmonoid i

        apply to_postmor_linear'.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

to_postmor x f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
i: hz
to_postmor x f 0%abgrcat i = 0%abgrcat i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops
f: ComplexPreCat_categoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (x i) (y i) · f i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (x i) (z i)

        apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
PreAdditive

categoryWithAbgrops

  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isZero ZeroComplex

isZero ZeroComplex

iscontr (ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, a ⟧)

iscontr (ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ a, ZeroComplex ⟧)

iscontr (ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, a ⟧)

iscontr (ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, C ⟧)

C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, C ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(λ cntr : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, C ⟧,
 ∏ t : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, C ⟧,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, C ⟧
 exact (MorphismFromZero C).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(λ cntr : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, C ⟧,
 ∏ t : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ ZeroComplex, C ⟧,
 t = cntr) (MorphismFromZero C)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
∏ t : Morphism ZeroComplex C, t = MorphismFromZero C
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
t: Morphism ZeroComplex C
t = MorphismFromZero C

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
t: Morphism ZeroComplex C
∏ i : hz, t i = MorphismFromZero C i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
t: Morphism ZeroComplex C
i: hz
t i = MorphismFromZero C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
t: Morphism ZeroComplex C
i: hz
t i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (C i)

        apply ArrowsFromZero.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive,
iscontr (ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ a, ZeroComplex ⟧)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
