iscontr (ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ C, ZeroComplex ⟧)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ C, ZeroComplex ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(λ cntr : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ C, ZeroComplex ⟧,
 ∏ t : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ C, ZeroComplex ⟧,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ C, ZeroComplex ⟧
 exact (MorphismToZero C).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(λ cntr : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ C, ZeroComplex ⟧,
 ∏ t : ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive ⟦ C, ZeroComplex ⟧,
 t = cntr) (MorphismToZero C)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
∏ t : Morphism C ZeroComplex, t = MorphismToZero C
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
t: Morphism C ZeroComplex
t = MorphismToZero C

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
t: Morphism C ZeroComplex
∏ i : hz, t i = MorphismToZero C i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
t: Morphism C ZeroComplex
i: hz
t i = MorphismToZero C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
t: Morphism C ZeroComplex
i: hz
t i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C i)
  (Additive.to_Zero A)

        apply ArrowsToZero.
  Defined.
  Opaque ComplexPreCat_isZero.


  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
isBinDirectSum (DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
isBinDirectSum (DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2
· DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2 = identity C1
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2
· DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2 = identity C2
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2
· DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2 = to_unel C1 C2
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2
· DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2 = to_unel C2 C1
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
to_binop (DirectSumComplex A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplex A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2
   · DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2
   · DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2) =
identity (DirectSumComplex A C1 C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2
· DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2 = identity C1
 apply (! (DirectSumIdIn1 A C1 C2)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2
· DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2 = identity C2
 apply (! (DirectSumIdIn2 A C1 C2)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2
· DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2 = to_unel C1 C2
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2) = ZeroMorphism A C1 C2
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
ZeroMorphism A C1 C2 = ZeroMorphism A C1 C2
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2
· DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2 = to_unel C2 C1
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
MorphismComp (DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2) = ZeroMorphism A C2 C1
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
ZeroMorphism A C2 C1 = ZeroMorphism A C2 C1
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
to_binop (DirectSumComplex A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplex A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2
   · DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2
   · DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2) =
identity (DirectSumComplex A C1 C2)
 apply (DirectSumId A C1 C2).
  Qed.

  (** The category of complexes over an additive category is additive *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
PreAdditive
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AdditiveStructure ?PA

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
PreAdditive
 exact ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AdditiveStructure ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
Zero ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
BinDirectSums ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
Zero ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isZero ?b

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
 exact ZeroComplex.
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isZero ZeroComplex
 exact ComplexPreCat_isZero.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
BinDirectSums ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
BinDirectSum C1 C2

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(C1 --> ?co)%abgrcat
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(C2 --> ?co)%abgrcat
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(?co --> C1)%abgrcat
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(?co --> C2)%abgrcat
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
isBinDirectSum ?i1 ?i2 ?p1 ?p2

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
 exact (DirectSumComplex A C1 C2).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(C1 --> DirectSumComplex A C1 C2)%abgrcat
 exact (DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(C2 --> DirectSumComplex A C1 C2)%abgrcat
 exact (DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(DirectSumComplex A C1 C2 --> C1)%abgrcat
 exact (DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
(DirectSumComplex A C1 C2 --> C2)%abgrcat
 exact (DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_PreAdditive
isBinDirectSum (DirectSumComplexIn1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexIn2 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr1 A C1 C2)
  (DirectSumComplexPr2 A C1 C2)
 exact (ComplexPreCat_isBinDirectSum C1 C2).
  Defined.

  Local Transparent ZeroArrow.
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive
ZeroMorphism A C1 C2 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero ComplexPreCat_Additive) C1
  C2

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive
ZeroMorphism A C1 C2 =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero ComplexPreCat_Additive) C1
  C2

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive
∏ i : hz,
ZeroMorphism A C1 C2 i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero ComplexPreCat_Additive) C1
  C2 i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive
∏ i : hz,
ZeroMorphism A C1 C2 i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero ComplexPreCat_Additive) C1
  C2 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive
i: hz
ZeroMorphism A C1 C2 i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero ComplexPreCat_Additive) C1
  C2 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive
i: hz
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i) =
ZeroArrowTo C1 i · ZeroArrowFrom C2 i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive
i: hz
ZeroArrowTo C1 i · ZeroArrowFrom C2 i =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i) (C2 i)
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Qed.
  Local Opaque ZeroArrow.

End complexes_additive.


(** * Complexes over Abelian is Abelian *)
(** ** Introduction
   We show that the category of complexes, [ComplexPreCat_Additive], over an abelian category A,
   more precisely [AbelianToAdditive A hs], is an abelian category, [ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat].
   Kernels and cokernels are given by taking kernels and cokernels indexwise. Since monics and epis
   in [ComplexPreCat_Additive] are indexwise monics and epis, by [ComplexMonicIndexMonic] and
   [ComplexEpiIndexEpi], we can use the fact that A is abelian to show that every monic is a kernel
   of some morphism in [ComplexPreCat_Additive] and every epi is a cokernel of some morphism in
   [ComplexPreCat_Additive].
*)
Section complexes_abelian.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.

  (** ** Kernels in Complexes over Abelian *)
  (** *** Construction of the kernel object *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i · g (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i · g (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · (Diff Y i · g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · (Diff Y i · g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= MComm g i: g i · Diff Z i = Diff Y i · g (i + 1)
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · (Diff Y i · g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= MComm g i: g i · Diff Z i = Diff Y i · g (i + 1)
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · (Diff Y i · g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= MComm g i: g i · Diff Z i = Diff Y i · g (i + 1)
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · (g i · Diff Z i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · (g i · Diff Z i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · g i · Diff Z i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z i) · Diff Z i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (g i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))) · Diff Y (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i))
  (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (g i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))) · Diff Y (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i))
  (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (g i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))) · Diff Y (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g (i + 1))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i))
  (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (g i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))) · Diff Y (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g (i + 1))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (g i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
     (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
      · Diff Y (i + 1))
     (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g (i + 1))
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (g i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
· (KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))) · Diff Y (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (g i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))) · Diff Y (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i · Diff Y (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i))
· (Diff Y i · Diff Y (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) Y i: Diff Y i · Diff Y (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A)) (Y i) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i))
· (Diff Y i · Diff Y (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) Y i: Diff Y i · Diff Y (i + 1) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i))
· (Diff Y i · Diff Y (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) Y i: Diff Y i · Diff Y (i + 1) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Y (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Y (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y (i + 1 + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ?D i, ?D (i + 1) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A
 exact (Kernel (g i)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (g i0)) i,
(λ i0 : hz, Kernel (g i0)) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i : hz, Kernel (g i)) i,
(λ i : hz, Kernel (g i)) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (g i), Kernel (g (i + 1)) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (g i), Y (i + 1) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
?h · g (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (g i), Y (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i · g (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Z (i + 1))
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i0 + 1)))
   (Kernel (g i0))
   (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i0)) · Diff Y i0)
   (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i0)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (g i1)) i0,
 (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (g i1)) (i0 + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i0 + 1)))
     (Kernel (g i0))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i0)) · Diff Y i0)
     (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i0)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (g i1)) i0,
   (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (g i1)) (i0 + 1) ⟧) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i0 : hz, Kernel (g i0)) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, Kernel (g i0)) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
   (Kernel (g i))
   (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
   (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (g i0)) i,
 (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (g i0)) (i + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
     (Kernel (g i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff Y i)
     (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (g i0)) i,
   (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (g i0)) (i + 1) ⟧) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i : hz, Kernel (g i)) i)
  ((λ i : hz, Kernel (g i)) (i + 1 + 1))
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_comp g i).
  Defined.

  (** *** Construction of the KernelArrow *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
Morphism (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g) Y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
Morphism (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g) Y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Kernel g i, Y i ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff Y i =
Diff (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g) i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Kernel g i, Y i ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Kernel g i, Y i ⟧
 use KernelArrow.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, KernelArrow (Kernel (g i0))) i · Diff Y i =
Diff (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g) i
· (λ i0 : hz, KernelArrow (Kernel (g i0))) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
(λ i : hz, KernelArrow (Kernel (g i))) i · Diff Y i =
Diff (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g) i
· (λ i : hz, KernelArrow (Kernel (g i))) (i + 1)
 exact (! (KernelCommutes _ _ _ _ _)).
  Defined.


  (** *** isEqualizer  *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
let Z :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) g =
MorphismComp (ZeroArrowTo (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g))
  (ZeroArrowFrom Y)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
let Z :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) g =
MorphismComp (ZeroArrowTo (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g))
  (ZeroArrowFrom Y)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) g i =
MorphismComp (ZeroArrowTo (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g))
  (ZeroArrowFrom Y) i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
i: hz
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) g i =
MorphismComp (ZeroArrowTo (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g))
  (ZeroArrowFrom Y) i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · g i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) (Y i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) (Y i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) (Y i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (Y i)
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
i: hz
let Z :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
→ h i · g i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
i: hz
let Z :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
→ h i · g i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
h i · g i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp h g) (ZeroArrow Z w Y) H i: MorphismComp h g i = ZeroArrow Z w Y i
h i · g i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp h g)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y) H i: h i · g i =
ZeroArrow
(make_Zero ZeroComplex (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y i
h i · g i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp h g)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y) H i: h i · g i =
ZeroArrow
(make_Zero ZeroComplex (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y i
h i · g i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp h g)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y) H i: h i · g i =
ZeroArrow
(make_Zero ZeroComplex (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y i
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
  i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
  i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Qed.

→ ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
  ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧

  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g) i =
Diff w i · ?Mors (i + 1)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)

  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
i: hz
A ⟦ w i, X i ⟧
 exact (h i).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
i: hz
h i · g i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Y i)
 apply (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i0)) (w i0) (h i0)
   (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i0 H)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ w i0, ComplexPreCat_Kernel g i0
 ⟧) i · Diff (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g) i =
Diff w i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i0)) (w i0) (h i0)
     (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i0 H)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ w i0,
   ComplexPreCat_Kernel g i0 ⟧) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
   (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ w i, ComplexPreCat_Kernel g i ⟧)
  i · Diff (ComplexPreCat_Kernel g) i =
Diff w i
· (λ i : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
     (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ w i, ComplexPreCat_Kernel g i
   ⟧) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Kernel (g i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff X i)
    (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i) =
Diff w i
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h (i + 1) H)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Kernel (g i))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff X i)
    (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))) =
Diff w i
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h (i + 1) H)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1)))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
     (Kernel (g i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff X i)
     (ComplexPreCat_Kernel_moreq g i)
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1)))) =
Diff w i
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h (i + 1) H)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1)))

  (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))
     (Kernel (g i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff X i)

   · KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1)))) =

· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))

   · KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))))

· (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff X i) =

· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g (i + 1)))

   · KernelArrow (Kernel (g (i + 1))))

g: Morphism X Y
h: Morphism w X
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y

  (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H)
· (KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) · Diff X i) =
Diff w i · h (i + 1)

h: Morphism w X

  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h g = ZeroArrow Z w Y
i: hz
h i · Diff X i = Diff w i · h (i + 1)

      apply (MComm h i).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
let Z :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
isKernel
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) g
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels_comp g)

  
A: AbelianPreCat

X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y

  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in

  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) g

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
isKernel
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) g

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
∏ (w : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
(h : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧),
h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))) w
  Y
→ ∃! ψ : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
         ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
  ψ · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
∃! ψ : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
       ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
ψ · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
(λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
       ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
 t · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h) ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
∏
y : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
    ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
          ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
    t · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
∏
y : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
    ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
(λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
       ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
 t · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h) y → y = ?x

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
 exact (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H').
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
(λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
       ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
 t · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h)
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H')
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H')
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) i = h i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
i: hz
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H')
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g) i = h i
 use KernelCommutes.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
∏
y : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
    ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
          ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
    t · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
          ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
    t · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h) y)
 apply has_homsets_ComplexPreCat.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
∏
y : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
    ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
(λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
       ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
 t · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h) y
→ y = ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H'
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
T: (λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
       ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧,
 t · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h) y
y = ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H'
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
T: y · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h
y = ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H'

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
T: y · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h
∏ i : hz, y i = ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H' i

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
T: y · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h
i: hz
y i = ComplexPreCat_KernelIn g h H' i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
T: y · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h
i: hz
y i =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H')

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
T: y · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h
i: hz
y i · KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelIn_comp g h i H')
· KernelArrow (Kernel (g i))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism X Y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · g =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) w Y
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w,
ComplexPreCat_Kernel g ⟧
T: y · ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow g = h
i: hz
y i · KernelArrow (Kernel (g i)) = h i

      apply (MorphismEq' _ _ _ T i).
  Qed.

  (** *** Kernels *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Kernels
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Kernels
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ X,
Y ⟧
Kernels.Kernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
Kernels.Kernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ ?x, X ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
?f · f =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) 
  ?x Y
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
isKernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) 
  ?f f ?H

    (* Kernel complex *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Kernel f).
    (* Kernel arrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Kernel f, X ⟧
 exact (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow f).
    (* Composition KernelArrow · g = ZeroArrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow f · f =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel f) Y
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Kernels_comp f).
    (* isEqualizer property *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
f: Morphism X Y
isKernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow f) f
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels_comp f)
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Kernels_isKernel f).
  Defined.


  (** ** Cokernels in Complexes over Abelian *)

  (** *** Cokernel complex *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
g i
· (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
g i
· (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
g i · Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
g i · Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= MComm g i: g i · Diff Z i = Diff Y i · g (i + 1)
g i · Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= MComm g i: g i · Diff Z i = Diff Y i · g (i + 1)
g i · Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= MComm g i: g i · Diff Z i = Diff Y i · g (i + 1)
Diff Y i · g (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
Diff Y i · g (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
Diff Y i
· (g (i + 1) · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
Diff Y i
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y (i + 1))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
  (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff Z (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
  (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
  (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff Z (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
  (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
     (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
     (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
       (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
       (Diff Z (i + 1)
        · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))))
       (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g (i + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
     (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
     (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
       (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
       (Diff Z (i + 1)
        · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))))
       (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff Z (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff Z (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
Diff Z i
· (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
       (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
       (Diff Z (i + 1)
        · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))))
       (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
Diff Z i
· (Diff Z (i + 1)
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
Diff Z i · Diff Z (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) Z i: Diff Z i · Diff Z (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A)) (Z i) (Z (i + 1 + 1))
Diff Z i · Diff Z (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

g: Morphism Y Z

Diff Z i · Diff Z (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

g: Morphism Y Z

Diff Z i · Diff Z (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) Z i: Diff Z i · Diff Z (i + 1) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Z (i + 1 + 1))
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Z (i + 1 + 1))
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Z (i + 1 + 1))
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Z i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1 + 1)))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

AbelianToAdditive A
 exact (Cokernel (g i)).

hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (g i0)) i,
(λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (g i0)) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat

g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz

g: Morphism Y Z

A ⟦ Cokernel (g i), Cokernel (g (i + 1)) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat

Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
A ⟦ Z i, Cokernel (g (i + 1)) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
g i · ?h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
A ⟦ Z i, Cokernel (g (i + 1)) ⟧
 exact ((Diff Z i) · (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
g i
· (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0))
   (Cokernel (g (i0 + 1)))
   (Diff Z i0 · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i0 + 1))))
   (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i0)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A
 ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (g i1)) i0,
 (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (g i1)) (i0 + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0))
     (Cokernel (g (i0 + 1)))
     (Diff Z i0
      · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i0 + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i0)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (g i1)) i0,
   (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (g i1)) (i0 + 1) ⟧) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (g i0)) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (g i0)) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
   (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
   (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
   (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (g i0)) i,
 (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (g i0)) (i + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
     (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
     (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (g i0)) i,
   (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (g i0)) (i + 1) ⟧) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i : hz, Cokernel (g i)) i)
  ((λ i : hz, Cokernel (g i)) (i + 1 + 1))
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comp g i).
  Defined.

  (** *** CokernelArrow *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
Morphism Z (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g)

AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ Z i, ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i
⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i =
Diff Z i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ Z i, ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i
⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ Z i, ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i
⟧
 use CokernelArrow.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i0))) i
· Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i =
Diff Z i
· (λ i0 : hz, CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i0))) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
i: hz
(λ i : hz, CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))) i
· Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i =
Diff Z i
· (λ i : hz, CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))) (i + 1)
 use CokernelCommutes.
  Defined.

  (** *** Cokernel *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
i: hz
let Z0 :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
g · h = ZeroArrow Z0 Y w
→ g i · h i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
i: hz
let Z0 :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
g · h = ZeroArrow Z0 Y w
→ g i · h i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
i: hz
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
g · h = ZeroArrow Z0 Y w
→ g i · h i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
i: hz
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
MorphismComp g h =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
→ g i · h i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
i: hz
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp g h =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
g i · h i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
i: hz
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp g h =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A) (g · h)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w) H i: (g · h) i =
ZeroArrow
(make_Zero ZeroComplex (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w i
g i · h i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
i: hz
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp g h =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp g h)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w) H i: g i · h i =
ZeroArrow
(make_Zero ZeroComplex (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w i
g i · h i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
i: hz
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp g h =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp g h)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w) H i: g i · h i =
ZeroArrow
(make_Zero ZeroComplex (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w i
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
  i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H) · Diff w i =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
  (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H) · Diff w i =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
  (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
     (h i) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H)
   · Diff w i) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
     (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
     (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
       (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
       (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H)
· Diff w i =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
     (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
     (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
       (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
       (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H))

g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H)
· Diff w i =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
h i · Diff w i =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
    (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
h i · Diff w i =
Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
h i · Diff w i =
Diff Z i
· (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
       (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
       (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H: g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  Y w
i: hz
h i · Diff w i = Diff Z i · h (i + 1)

    apply (MComm h i).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
let Z0 :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
MorphismComp g (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g) =
MorphismComp (ZeroArrowTo Y)
  (ZeroArrowFrom (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
let Z0 :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
MorphismComp g (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g) =
MorphismComp (ZeroArrowTo Y)
  (ZeroArrowFrom (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp g (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g) i =
MorphismComp (ZeroArrowTo Y)
  (ZeroArrowFrom (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g)) i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
i: hz
MorphismComp g (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g) i =
MorphismComp (ZeroArrowTo Y)
  (ZeroArrowFrom (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g)) i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
i: hz
g i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (Cokernel (g i))
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
let Z0 :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
isCokernel
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))) g
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Comp g)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
let Z0 :=
  Additive.to_Zero
    (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) in
isCokernel

     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))) g
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Comp g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
isCokernel
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))) g
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Comp g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
∏ (w : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
(h : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧),
g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y
  w
→ ∃! ψ : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
         ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
  ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∃! ψ : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
(λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
 ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · t = h) ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∏
y : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
    ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
          ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
    ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · t = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∏
y : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
    ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
(λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
 ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · t = h) y → y = ?x

Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

H': g · h =

  (Additive.to_Zero

        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i, 
w i ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff w i =
Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i · ?Mors (i + 1)

w i ⟧

w i ⟧

g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)

H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
i: hz
A ⟦ Cokernel (g i), w i ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat

Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
