  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
i: hz
A ⟦ Z i, w i ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
i: hz
g i · ?h0 = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
i: hz
A ⟦ Z i, w i ⟧
 exact (MMor h i).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
i: hz
g i · h i = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Y i) (w i)
 exact (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H').
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
   (h i0) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0,
 w i0 ⟧) i · Diff w i =
Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
     (h i0) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0,
   w i0 ⟧) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
   (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i, 
 w i ⟧) i · Diff w i =
Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i
· (λ i : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
     (h i) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i,
   w i ⟧) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H') · Diff w i =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i))
  (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
  (Diff Z i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g (i + 1))))
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel_comm g i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g (i + 1)))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h (i + 1) H')
 use ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
(λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
 ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · t = h)
  (make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
     (λ i : hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
        (h i)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')
      :
      AbelianToAdditive A
      ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i, w i ⟧)
     (λ i : hz,
      ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i
      :
      (λ i0 : hz,
       CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0))
         (w i0) (h i0)
         (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
       :
       AbelianToAdditive A
       ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0, w i0 ⟧) i
      · Diff w i =
      Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i
      · (λ i0 : hz,
         CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0))
           (w i0) (h i0)
           (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
         :
         AbelianToAdditive A
         ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0, w i0 ⟧)
          (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g)
  (make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
     (λ i : pr1 hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
        (h i)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H'))
     (λ i : pr1 hz,
      ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i)) = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g)
  (make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
        (h i0)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H'))
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i0)) i = h i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
i: hz
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g)
  (make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
     (λ i : pr1 hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
        (h i)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H'))
     (λ i : pr1 hz,
      ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i)) i = h i
 use CokernelCommutes.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∏
y : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
    ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
          ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
    ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · t = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
          ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
    ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · t = h) y)
 apply has_homsets_ComplexPreCat.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
∏
y : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
    ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
(λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
 ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · t = h) y
→ y =
  make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
    (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
    (λ i : hz,
     CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
       (h i) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')
     :
     AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i,
     w i ⟧)
    (λ i : hz,
     ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i
     :
     (λ i0 : hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
        (h i0)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
      :
      AbelianToAdditive A
      ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0, w i0 ⟧) i
     · Diff w i =
     Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i
     · (λ i0 : hz,
        CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0))
          (w i0) (h i0)
          (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
        :
        AbelianToAdditive A
        ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0, w i0 ⟧) (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: (λ t : ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
       ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧,
 ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · t = h) y
y =
make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
  (λ i : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
     (h i) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i,
   w i ⟧)
  (λ i : hz,
   ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i
   :
   (λ i0 : hz,
    CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
      (h i0)
      (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
    :
    AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0,
    w i0 ⟧) i · Diff w i =
   Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i
   · (λ i0 : hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
        (h i0)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
      :
      AbelianToAdditive A
      ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0, w i0 ⟧) (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y = h
y =
make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
  (λ i : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
     (h i) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i,
   w i ⟧)
  (λ i : hz,
   ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i
   :
   (λ i0 : hz,
    CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
      (h i0)
      (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
    :
    AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0,
    w i0 ⟧) i · Diff w i =
   Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i
   · (λ i0 : hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
        (h i0)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
      :
      AbelianToAdditive A
      ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0, w i0 ⟧) (i + 1))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y = h
∏ i : hz,
y i =
make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
  (λ i0 : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
     (h i0) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0,
   w i0 ⟧)
  (λ i0 : hz,
   ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i0
   :
   (λ i1 : hz,
    CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i1)) (w i1)
      (h i1)
      (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i1 H')
    :
    AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i1,
    w i1 ⟧) i0 · Diff w i0 =
   Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i0
   · (λ i1 : hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i1)) (w i1)
        (h i1)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i1 H')
      :
      AbelianToAdditive A
      ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i1, w i1 ⟧) (i0 + 1))
  i

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y = h
i: hz
y i =
make_Morphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) w
  (λ i : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i)
     (h i) (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i,
   w i ⟧)
  (λ i : hz,
   ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Eq g h H' i
   :
   (λ i0 : hz,
    CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
      (h i0)
      (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
    :
    AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0,
    w i0 ⟧) i · Diff w i =
   Diff (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g) i
   · (λ i0 : hz,
      CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i0)) (w i0)
        (h i0)
        (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i0 H')
      :
      AbelianToAdditive A
      ⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g i0, w i0 ⟧) (i + 1))
  i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y = h
i: hz
y i =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y = h
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i)) · y i =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (g i)) (w i) (h i)
    (ComplexPreCat_CokernelCompZero g h i H')

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y = h
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i)) · y i = h i

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y) h T i: (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y) i = h i
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i)) · y i = h i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Z0:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, w ⟧
H': g · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y w
y: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
⟦ ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g, w ⟧
T: ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g · y = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g) y)
  h T i: CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i)) · y i = h i
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (g i)) · y i = h i

      exact tmp.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Cokernels
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Cokernels
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Y,
Z ⟧
Cokernels.Cokernel
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))) g
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
Cokernels.Cokernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z, ?z ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
g · ?g =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y
  ?z
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
isCokernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) g
  ?g ?H

    (* Cokernel *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g).
    (* CokernelArrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ Z,
ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g ⟧
 exact (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g).
    (* Composition is zero *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
g · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) Y
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel g)
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Comp g).
    (* isCoequalizer *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Y, Z: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
g: Morphism Y Z
isCokernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) g
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow g)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Comp g)
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_isCokernel g).
  Defined.


  (** ** Monics are kernels *)

  (** *** Kernel complex from Monic *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
M i
· (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
M i
· (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
M i · Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
Diff x i · M (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
Diff x i
· (M (i + 1) · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
Diff x i
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x (i + 1))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
  (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
  (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))))
  (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff y (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
  (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
  (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
  (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))))
  (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff y (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
  (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
     (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
     (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
       (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
       (Diff y (i + 1)
        · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))))
       (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M
          (i + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
    (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff y (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M (i + 1)) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff y (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M (i + 1)) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
Diff y i
· (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
       (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
       (Diff y (i + 1)
        · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))))
       (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M
          (i + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
Diff y i
· (Diff y (i + 1)
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

  y

Diff y i · Diff y (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))) =

· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
Diff y i · Diff y (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))) =

· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) y i: Diff y i · Diff y (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A)) (y i) (y (i + 1 + 1))
Diff y i · Diff y (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) y i: Diff y i · Diff y (i + 1) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (y i) (y (i + 1 + 1))
Diff y i · Diff y (i + 1)
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) y i: Diff y i · Diff y (i + 1) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (y i) (y (i + 1 + 1))
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (y i) (y (i + 1 + 1))
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (y i) (y (i + 1 + 1))
· CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (y i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))) =
CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (y i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (y i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x

AbelianToAdditive A
 exact (Cokernel (@MMor _ x y (MonicArrow _ M) i)).

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
A ⟦ y i, Cokernel (M (i + 1)) ⟧
 exact ((Diff y i) · (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (@MMor _ x y (MonicArrow _ M) (i + 1))))).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
M i
· (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
 use ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i0))
   (Cokernel (M (i0 + 1)))
   (Diff y i0 · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i0 + 1))))
   (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i0)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A
 ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (M i1)) i0,
 (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (M i1)) (i0 + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i0))
     (Cokernel (M (i0 + 1)))
     (Diff y i0
      · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i0 + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i0)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (M i1)) i0,
   (λ i1 : hz, Cokernel (M i1)) (i0 + 1) ⟧) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (M i0)) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (M i0)) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
   (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
   (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))))
   (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (M i0)) i,
 (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (M i0)) (i + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
     (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
     (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))))
     (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (M i0)) i,
   (λ i0 : hz, Cokernel (M i0)) (i + 1) ⟧) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i : hz, Cokernel (M i)) i)
  ((λ i : hz, Cokernel (M i)) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
i: hz
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
  (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
  (Diff y i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1))))
  (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M i)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M (i + 1)))
    (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Diff y (i + 1)
     · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1))))
    (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comm M (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Cokernel (M i))
  (Cokernel (M (i + 1 + 1)))
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Monic_Kernel_Complex_comp M i).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
MorphismComp M
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow (M : Morphism x y)) =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) x
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel (M : Morphism x y))

M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
MorphismComp M
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow (M : Morphism x y)) =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) x
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel (M : Morphism x y))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp M
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow (M : Morphism x y)) i =

  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel (M : Morphism x y)) i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
i: hz
MorphismComp M
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow (M : Morphism x y)) i =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) x
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel (M : Morphism x y)) i
 use CokernelCompZero.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
h i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Cokernel (M i))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
h i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Cokernel (M i))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
H':= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M)
  (ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)) H i: (h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M) i =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M) i
h i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Cokernel (M i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
H':= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M))
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) w
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)) H i: h i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i)) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M) i
h i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Cokernel (M i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
H':= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M))
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) w
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)) H i: h i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i)) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M) i
h i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Cokernel (M i))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
H':= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M))
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A))) w
     (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)) H i: h i · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (M i)) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M) i
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) w
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M) i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (w i) (Cokernel (M i))
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel
     (make_Monic A (M i)
        (ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A)
           M i))) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H) · Diff x i =
Diff w i
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (MonicToKernel
       (make_Monic A (M (i + 1))
          (ComplexMonicIndexMonic
             (AbelianToAdditive A) M (i + 1))))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h (i + 1) H)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel
     (make_Monic A (M i)
        (ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A)
           M i))) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H) · Diff x i =
Diff w i
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (MonicToKernel
       (make_Monic A (M (i + 1))
          (ComplexMonicIndexMonic
             (AbelianToAdditive A) M (i + 1))))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h (i + 1) H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A (M i) (isM i))) (w i)
  (h i) (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H) · Diff x i =
Diff w i
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (MonicToKernel
       (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h (i + 1) H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
ker:= MonicToKernel
  (make_Monic (AbelianToAdditive A) (M (i + 1))
     (isM (i + 1))): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
(CokernelArrow
(to_Cokernels A (x (i + 1)) (y (i + 1))
(make_Monic (AbelianToAdditive A) (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1)))))
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A (M i) (isM i))) (w i)
  (h i) (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H) · Diff x i =
Diff w i
· KernelIn (to_Zero A)
    (MonicToKernel
       (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))))
    (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h (i + 1) H)

Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : pr1 hz, isMonic (M i)
ker:= MonicToKernel
  (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
(CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A (x (i + 1)) (y (i + 1)) (M (i + 1))))
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A (M i) (isM i))) (w i)

· (Diff x i · KernelArrow ker) =
Diff w i
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker (w (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
     (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h (i + 1) H)
   · KernelArrow ker)

· (Diff x i · KernelArrow ker) = Diff w i · h (i + 1)

H: MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M) =

  (make_Zero ZeroComplex

  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : pr1 hz, isMonic (M i)
ker:= MonicToKernel
  (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
(CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A (x (i + 1)) (y (i + 1)) (M (i + 1))))
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A (M i) (isM i))) (w i)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: Morphism w y
i: pr1 hz
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : pr1 hz, isMonic (M i)
ker:= MonicToKernel
  (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
(CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A (x (i + 1)) (y (i + 1)) (M (i + 1))))
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A (M i) (isM i))) (w i)
  (h i) (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H)
· (Diff x i · M (i + 1)) = h i · Diff y i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: Morphism w y
i: pr1 hz
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : pr1 hz, isMonic (M i)
ker:= MonicToKernel
  (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
(CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A (x (i + 1)) (y (i + 1)) (M (i + 1))))
tmp:= MComm M i: M i · Diff y i = Diff x i · M (i + 1)
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A (M i) (isM i))) (w i)
  (h i) (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H)
· (Diff x i · M (i + 1)) = h i · Diff y i

  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))

ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : pr1 hz, isMonic (M i)
ker:= MonicToKernel
  (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
(CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A (x (i + 1)) (y (i + 1)) (M (i + 1))))
KernelIn (to_Zero A)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: Morphism w y
i: pr1 hz
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : pr1 hz, isMonic (M i)
ker:= MonicToKernel
  (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
(CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A (x (i + 1)) (y (i + 1)) (M (i + 1))))
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A (M i) (isM i))) (w i)
  (h i) (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H) · M i
· Diff y i = h i · Diff y i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: Morphism w y
i: pr1 hz
Z:= make_Zero ZeroComplex
  (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp h (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : pr1 hz, isMonic (M i)
ker:= MonicToKernel
  (make_Monic A (M (i + 1)) (isM (i + 1))): Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
(CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A (x (i + 1)) (y (i + 1)) (M (i + 1))))
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A (M i) (isM i))) (w i)
  (h i) (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H) · M i = 
h i

    apply (KernelCommutes _ (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A _ (isM i))) (w i) (MMor h i)).
  Qed.


  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
→ ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, x ⟧

→ ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, x ⟧

Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero

H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
∏ i : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ w i, x i ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff x i = Diff w i · ?Mors (i + 1)

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =

∏ i : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ w i, x i ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ w i, x i ⟧

      exact (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (MonicToKernel (make_Monic _ _ (isM i))) _ (MMor h i)
                      (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H')).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A)
   (MonicToKernel
      (make_Monic (AbelianToAdditive A) (M i0)
         (isM i0))) (w i0) (h i0)
   (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i0 H')) i · Diff x i =
Diff w i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (MonicToKernel
        (make_Monic (AbelianToAdditive A) (M i0)
           (isM i0))) (w i0) (h i0)
     (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i0 H')) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A)
   (MonicToKernel
      (make_Monic (AbelianToAdditive A) (M i) (isM i)))
   (w i) (h i) (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H')) i
· Diff x i =
Diff w i
· (λ i : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (MonicToKernel
        (make_Monic (AbelianToAdditive A) (M i)
           (isM i))) (w i) (h i)
     (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H')) (i + 1)
 exact (ComplexMonicKernelIn_Complex_Comm M h i H').
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
M · CokernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels x y M) =
ZeroArrow Z x (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels x y M)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
M · CokernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels x y M) =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
MorphismComp M (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) x
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A) x
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M) =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) x
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
 apply ComplexPreCat_ZeroArrow_ZeroMorphism.
  Qed.

isKernel Z M (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M)
  (CokernelCompZero Z (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels x y M))

x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel
     (make_Monic A (M i)
        (ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A)
           M i))) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H') · M i = h i

      apply (KernelCommutes _ (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A _ (isM i))) _ (MMor h i)).

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))

w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
y0: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, x ⟧
T: MorphismComp y0 M = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp y0 M) h T i: MorphismComp y0 M i = h i
y0 i · M i = ComplexMonicKernelIn M h H' i · M i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
y0: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, x ⟧
T: MorphismComp y0 M = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp y0 M) h T i: y0 i · M i = h i
y0 i · M i = ComplexMonicKernelIn M h H' i · M i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
y0: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, x ⟧
T: MorphismComp y0 M = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp y0 M) h T i: y0 i · M i = h i
y0 i · M i =
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel
     (make_Monic A (M i)
        (ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A)
           M i))) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H') · M i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
y0: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, x ⟧
T: MorphismComp y0 M = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp y0 M) h T i: y0 i · M i = h i
h i =
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel
     (make_Monic A (M i)
        (ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A)
           M i))) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H') · M i

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
y0: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, x ⟧
T: MorphismComp y0 M = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp y0 M) h T i: y0 i · M i = h i
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel
     (make_Monic A (M i)
        (ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A)
           M i))) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H') · M i = h i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: Complex (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
isM:= ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A) M: ∏ i : hz, isMonic (M i)
w: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M =
ZeroArrow Z w (ComplexPreCat_Cokernel M)
y0: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ w, x ⟧
T: MorphismComp y0 M = h
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (MonicToKernel
     (make_Monic A (M i)
        (ComplexMonicIndexMonic (AbelianToAdditive A)
           M i))) (w i) (h i)
  (ComplexMonicKernelInComm M h i H') · M i = h i

      apply (KernelCommutes _ (MonicToKernel (make_Monic A _ (isM i))) _ (MMor h i)).
  Qed.


  (** ** Epis are Cokernels of kernels *)


  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i · E (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y (i + 1))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i · E (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · (Diff x i · E (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · (E i · Diff y i) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y (i + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · E i · Diff y i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y (i + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y i) · Diff y i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y (i + 1))
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (E i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1))) · Diff x (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (E i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1))) · Diff x (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (E i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i)
· KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
    (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
    (KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1))) · Diff x (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E (i + 1))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
  (Kernel (E i))
  (KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i)
  (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i)
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
     (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
      · Diff x (i + 1))
     (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E
        (i + 1))
   · KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))

  x y

  (Kernel (E i))

  (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i)
· (KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1))) · Diff x (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))

E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y

  (Kernel (E i))

  (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i)
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1))) · Diff x (i + 1) =

  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i))
· (Diff x i · Diff x (i + 1)) =

  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i))
· (Diff x i · Diff x (i + 1)) =

  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) x i: Diff x i · Diff x (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A)) (x i) (x (i + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i))
· (Diff x i · Diff x (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) x i: Diff x i · Diff x (i + 1) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (x (i + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i))
· (Diff x i · Diff x (i + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
tmp:= DSq (AbelianToAdditive A) x i: Diff x i · Diff x (i + 1) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (x (i + 1 + 1))
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (x (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i))
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (x i) (x (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (x (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i))
  (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
· KernelArrow (Kernel (E (i + 1 + 1)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (x (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (x (i + 1 + 1))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.


  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)

  x y
ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
