hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
∏ i : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ ?D i, ?D (i + 1) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
hz → AbelianToAdditive A
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A

      exact (Kernel (@MMor _ x y (EpiArrow _ E) i)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
∏ i : hz,
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (E i0)) i,
(λ i0 : hz, Kernel (E i0)) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i : hz, Kernel (E i)) i,
(λ i : hz, Kernel (E i)) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (E i), Kernel (E (i + 1)) ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (E i), x (i + 1) ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
?h · E (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y (i + 1))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
A ⟦ Kernel (E i), x (i + 1) ⟧
 exact ((KernelArrow (Kernel (@MMor _ x y (EpiArrow _ E) i))) · (Diff x i)).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i · E (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (y (i + 1))
 apply ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i0 + 1)))
   (Kernel (E i0))
   (KernelArrow (Kernel (E i0)) · Diff x i0)
   (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i0)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (E i1)) i0,
 (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (E i1)) (i0 + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i0 + 1)))
     (Kernel (E i0))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (E i0)) · Diff x i0)
     (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i0)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A
   ⟦ (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (E i1)) i0,
   (λ i1 : hz, Kernel (E i1)) (i0 + 1) ⟧) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i0 : hz, Kernel (E i0)) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, Kernel (E i0)) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
   (Kernel (E i))
   (KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i)
   (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i)
 :
 AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (E i0)) i,
 (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (E i0)) (i + 1) ⟧) i
· (λ i : hz,
   KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E (i + 1)))
     (Kernel (E i))
     (KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · Diff x i)
     (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comm E i)
   :
   AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (E i0)) i,
   (λ i0 : hz, Kernel (E i0)) (i + 1) ⟧) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero (AbelianToAdditive A))
  ((λ i : hz, Kernel (E i)) i)
  ((λ i : hz, Kernel (E i)) (i + 1 + 1))
 exact (ComplexPreCat_Epi_Cokernel_Complex_comp E i).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) E =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) E =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) E i =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) y i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
i: hz
MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) E i =
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) y i
 use KernelCompZero.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · h i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (w0 i)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · h i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (w0 i)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
H':= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp
     (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y))
     h)
  (ZeroArrow Z
     (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0)
  H i: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y))
  h i =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0 i
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · h i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (w0 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
H':= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow E) h)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) w0) H i: KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · h i =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) w0 i
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · h i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (w0 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
H':= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow E) h)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) w0) H i: KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · h i =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) w0 i
KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · h i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (w0 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
i: hz
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
H':= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow E) h)
  (ZeroArrow
     (make_Zero ZeroComplex
        (ComplexPreCat_isZero
           (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) w0) H i: KernelArrow (Kernel (E i)) · h i =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) w0 i
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) w0 i =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Kernel (E i)) (w0 i)
 apply ZeroArrowEq.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A (E i) (isE i))) (w0 i)
  (h i) (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H)
· Diff w0 i =
Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A (E i) (isE i))) (w0 i)
  (h i) (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H)
· Diff w0 i =
Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A (E i) (isE i))) (w0 i)
  (h i) (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H)
· Diff w0 i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
  (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A (E i) (isE i))) (w0 i)
  (h i) (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H)
· Diff w0 i

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
CokernelArrow coker
· (Diff y i
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (EpiToCokernel
          (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
       (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
       (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H)) =
CokernelArrow coker
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A (E i) (isE i))) (w0 i)
     (h i) (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H)
   · Diff w0 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
CokernelArrow coker · Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
CokernelArrow coker
· (CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A (E i) (isE i))) (w0 i)
     (h i) (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H)
   · Diff w0 i)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
CokernelArrow coker · Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =

· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A (E i) (isE i))) (w0 i)

· Diff w0 i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
CokernelArrow coker · Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
h i · Diff w0 i

  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0

  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i)

           (E i) (isE i))))

i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
E i · Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
tmp:= MComm E i: E i · Diff y i = Diff x i · E (i + 1)
E i · Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
Diff x i · h (i + 1)

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
tmp:= MComm E i: E i · Diff y i = Diff x i · E (i + 1)
E i · Diff y i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
Diff x i · h (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
tmp:= MComm E i: E i · Diff y i = Diff x i · E (i + 1)
Diff x i · E (i + 1)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
Diff x i · h (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
Diff x i · E (i + 1)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
Diff x i · h (i + 1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
Diff x i
· (E (i + 1)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (EpiToCokernel
          (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
       (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
       (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H)) =
Diff x i · h (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, w0: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
i: hz
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) w0
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
coker:= EpiToCokernel
  (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A (x i) 
        (y i)
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) 
           (E i) (isE i))))
E (i + 1)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E (i + 1)) (isE (i + 1))))
    (w0 (i + 1)) (h (i + 1))
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h (i + 1) H) =
h (i + 1)

    apply (CokernelCommutes _ (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A _ (isE (i + 1))))).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, z ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ y, z ⟧

hs:= A: has_homsets A

E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ y, z ⟧

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, z ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ y, z ⟧

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, z ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
∏ i : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ y i, z i ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, z ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff z i = Diff y i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, z ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
∏ i : hz, AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ y i, z i ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, z ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
i: hz
AbelianToAdditive A ⟦ y i, z i ⟧
 exact (CokernelOut
                         (to_Zero A) (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi _ _ (isE i))) _ (MMor h i)
                         (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, z ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
   (EpiToCokernel
      (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i0) (isE i0)))
   (z i0) (h i0)
   (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i0 H)) i
· Diff z i =
Diff y i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (EpiToCokernel
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i0)
           (isE i0))) (z i0) (h i0)
     (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i0 H)) (i + 1)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
h: ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A) ⟦ x, z ⟧
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
H: MorphismComp
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow (E : Morphism x y)) h =
ZeroArrow Z
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel (E : Morphism x y)) z
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
   (EpiToCokernel
      (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)))
   (z i) (h i) (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H))
  i · Diff z i =
Diff y i
· (λ i : hz,
   CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
     (EpiToCokernel
        (make_Epi (AbelianToAdditive A) (E i) (isE i)))
     (z i) (h i)
     (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H)) (i + 1)
 exact (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comm E i h H).
  Defined.

  (** *** EpisCokernelsData *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · E =
ZeroArrow Z (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · E =
ZeroArrow Z (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
MorphismComp (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow E) E =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) y
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexCat (AbelianToAdditive A)) x y
Z:= Additive.to_Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)): Zero
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
ZeroMorphism (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) y =
ZeroArrow
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernel E) y
 apply ComplexPreCat_ZeroArrow_ZeroMorphism.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isCokernel
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E)) E
  (CokernelMorphism_eq' E)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isCokernel
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E)) E
  (CokernelMorphism_eq' E)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
isCokernel
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E)) E
  (CokernelMorphism_eq' E)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
∏ (w : Add) (h : Add ⟦ x, w ⟧),
KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w
→ ∃! ψ : Add ⟦ y, w ⟧, E · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
∃! ψ : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧, E · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
(λ t : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧, E · t = h) ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
∏ y0 : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧,
isaprop ((λ t : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧, E · t = h) y0)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
∏ y0 : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧,
(λ t : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧, E · t = h) y0 → y0 = ?x

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
 apply (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut E h H').
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
(λ t : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧, E · t = h)
  (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut E h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
MorphismComp E (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut E h H') = h
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp E (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut E h H') i =
h i

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
i: hz
MorphismComp E (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut E h H') i =
h i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
i: hz
E i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E i)
          (ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E
             i))) (w0 i) (h i)
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H') = h i

      apply (CokernelCommutes _ (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A _ (isE i))) _ (MMor h i)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)

  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
∏ y0 : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧,
isaprop ((λ t : Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧, E · t = h) y0)

  (MorphismComp E y0) h T i: MorphismComp E y0 i = h i
E i · y0 i = E i · ComplexPreCatCokernelOut E h H' i

  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
y0: Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧

i: hz

  (MorphismComp E y0) h T i: E i · y0 i = h i
E i · y0 i =
E i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E i)
          (ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E
             i))) (w0 i) (h i)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧

ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
y0: Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
T: MorphismComp E y0 = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp E y0) h T i: E i · y0 i = h i
h i =
E i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E i)
          (ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E
             i))) (w0 i) (h i)
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H')

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
y0: Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
T: MorphismComp E y0 = h
i: hz
tmp:= MorphismEq' (AbelianToAdditive A)
  (MorphismComp E y0) h T i: E i · y0 i = h i
E i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E i)
          (ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E
             i))) (w0 i) (h i)
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H') = h i
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
Add:= ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A): CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isE:= ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E: ∏ i : hz, isEpi (E i)
w0: Add
h: Add ⟦ x, w0 ⟧
H': KernelArrow (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) · h =
ZeroArrow
  (Additive.to_Zero
     (ComplexPreCat_Additive
        (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels x y E) w0
y0: Add ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
T: MorphismComp E y0 = h
i: hz
E i
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
    (EpiToCokernel
       (make_Epi A (E i)
          (ComplexEpiIndexEpi (AbelianToAdditive A) E
             i))) (w0 i) (h i)
    (ComplexPreCatCokernelOut_comp E h i H') = h i

      apply (CokernelCommutes _ (EpiToCokernel (make_Epi A _ (isE i))) _ (MMor h i)).
  Qed.

  (** ** Complexes over Abelian is Abelian *)

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (make_Data1
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     (Additive.to_BinProducts
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))))
  (make_Data2
     (make_Data1

           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinProducts

     ComplexPreCat_Kernels ComplexPreCat_Cokernels)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
∏ (x y : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
(M : Monic
       (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
       x y),
isKernel
  (pr1
     (make_Data1
        (Additive.to_Zero
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinProducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A))))) M
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1
              (Additive.to_Zero
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinProducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A))))
           ComplexPreCat_Kernels
           ComplexPreCat_Cokernels) x y M))
  (CokernelCompZero
     (to_Zero
        (make_Data1
           (Additive.to_Zero
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))
           (Additive.to_BinProducts
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))
           (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))))
     (to_Cokernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1
              (Additive.to_Zero
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinProducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A))))
           ComplexPreCat_Kernels
           ComplexPreCat_Cokernels) x y M))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
isKernel
  (pr1
     (make_Data1
        (Additive.to_Zero
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinProducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A))))) M
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1
              (Additive.to_Zero
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinProducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A))))
           ComplexPreCat_Kernels
           ComplexPreCat_Cokernels) x y M))
  (CokernelCompZero
     (to_Zero
        (make_Data1
           (Additive.to_Zero
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))
           (Additive.to_BinProducts
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))
           (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))))
     (to_Cokernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1
              (Additive.to_Zero
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinProducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A))))
           ComplexPreCat_Kernels
           ComplexPreCat_Cokernels) x y M))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
M: Monic
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)) x
  y
isKernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A))) M
  (ComplexPreCat_CokernelArrow M)
  (ComplexPreCat_Cokernels_Comp M)

        exact (ComplexPreCatAbelianMonicKernelsData_isKernel M).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
EpisAreCokernels
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  (make_Data1
     (Additive.to_Zero
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     (Additive.to_BinProducts
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)))
     (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
        (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))))
  (make_Data2
     (make_Data1
        (Additive.to_Zero
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinProducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A))))
     ComplexPreCat_Kernels ComplexPreCat_Cokernels)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
∏ (x y : ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
(E : Epi
       (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
       x y),
isCokernel
  (pr1
     (make_Data1
        (Additive.to_Zero
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinProducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))))
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1
              (Additive.to_Zero
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinProducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A))))
           ComplexPreCat_Kernels
           ComplexPreCat_Cokernels) x y E)) E
  (KernelCompZero
     (to_Zero
        (make_Data1
           (Additive.to_Zero
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))
           (Additive.to_BinProducts
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))
           (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))))
     (to_Kernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1
              (Additive.to_Zero
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinProducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A))))
           ComplexPreCat_Kernels
           ComplexPreCat_Cokernels) x y E))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
isCokernel
  (pr1
     (make_Data1
        (Additive.to_Zero
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinProducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))
        (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
           (ComplexPreCat_Additive
              (AbelianToAdditive A)))))
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1
              (Additive.to_Zero
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinProducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A))))
           ComplexPreCat_Kernels
           ComplexPreCat_Cokernels) x y E)) E
  (KernelCompZero
     (to_Zero
        (make_Data1
           (Additive.to_Zero
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))
           (Additive.to_BinProducts
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))
           (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
              (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                 (AbelianToAdditive A)))))
     (to_Kernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1
              (Additive.to_Zero
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinProducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A)))
              (Additive.to_BinCoproducts
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive
                    (AbelianToAdditive A))))
           ComplexPreCat_Kernels
           ComplexPreCat_Cokernels) x y E))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A)
E: Epi (ComplexPreCat_Additive (AbelianToAdditive A))
  x y
isCokernel
  (make_Zero ZeroComplex
     (ComplexPreCat_isZero (AbelianToAdditive A)))
  (ComplexPreCat_KernelArrow E) E
  (ComplexPreCat_Kernels_comp E)

        exact (ComplexPreCatAbelianEpiCokernelsData_isCokernel E).
  Defined.


  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
has_homsets ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
has_homsets ComplexPreCat_AbelianPreCat

    apply has_homsets_ComplexPreCat.
  Qed.

End complexes_abelian.



(** * Transport binary direct sums *)
Section transport_hz_toBinDirectSums.

  Context {A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure}.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0)) e =
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i')) e @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i) (f' i0)) e

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0)) e =
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i')) e @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i) (f' i0)) e

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i': hz
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
  (idpath i') =
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i'))
  (idpath i') @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i0))
  (idpath i')
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i')) e @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i) (f' i0)) e =
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i0)) e @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i)) e

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i')) e @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i) (f' i0)) e =
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i0)) e @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i)) e

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i': hz
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i'))
  (idpath i') @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i0))
  (idpath i') =
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i0))
  (idpath i') @
maponpaths
  (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i'))
  (idpath i')
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0)) e)
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
     (maponpaths f e) ι₁%abgrcat)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0)) e)
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
     (maponpaths f e) ι₁%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i': hz
ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i'))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
     (idpath i'))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
     (maponpaths f (idpath i')) ι₁%abgrcat)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
     (! e)) ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
  (maponpaths f e) ι₁%abgrcat

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
     (! e)) ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
  (maponpaths f e) ι₁%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i': hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f i'))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
     (! idpath i')) ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (idpath i')) ι₁%abgrcat
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f' i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0)) e)
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
     (maponpaths f' e) ι₂%abgrcat)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f' i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0)) e)
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
     (maponpaths f' e) ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i': hz
ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f' i'))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
     (idpath i'))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
     (maponpaths f' (idpath i')) ι₂%abgrcat)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f' i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
     (! e)) ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
  (maponpaths f' e) ι₂%abgrcat

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f' i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
     (! e)) ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
  (maponpaths f' e) ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i': hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f' i'))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
     (! idpath i')) ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i') ⟧)
  (maponpaths f' (idpath i')) ι₂%abgrcat
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
π₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (f i) (f' i)))
  (maponpaths f e)
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, f i' ⟧)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
        e) π₁%abgrcat)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
π₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (f i) (f' i)))
  (maponpaths f e)
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, f i' ⟧)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
        e) π₁%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i': hz
π₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i')))
  (maponpaths f (idpath i'))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, f i' ⟧)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0))
        (idpath i')) π₁%abgrcat)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
f, f': hz → A
i, i': hz
e: i' = i
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (f i) (f' i)))
  (maponpaths f (! e)) π₁%abgrcat =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, f i' ⟧)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz, to_BinDirectSums A (f i0) (f' i0)) e)
  π₁%abgrcat

e: i' = i

  (precategory_morphisms

  (maponpaths f' (! e)) π₂%abgrcat =

f, f': hz → A
i': hz

  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (f i') (f' i')))
  (maponpaths f' (! idpath i')) π₂%abgrcat =
